Good day, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the first six months of 2024 Novo Nordisk A/S earnings conference call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode. After the speakers' presentation, there will be a question-and-answer session.

pairs.en: Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you. Welcome to this Novo Nordisk earnings call for the first six months of 2024. My name is Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode, and I'm the head of investor relations at Novo Nordisk. With me today, I have CEO of Novo Nordisk, Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen; executive vice president and head of commercial strategy and corporate affairs, Camilla Sylvest; executive vice president and head of North America operations, Doug Langa; executive vice president and head of development, Martin Holst Lange; and finally, chief financial officer, Karsten Munk Knudsen.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。欢迎参加诺和诺德2024年上半年财报电话会议。我是Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode，诺和诺德投资者关系负责人。今天与我一同出席的有诺和诺德首席执行官Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen；执行副总裁兼商业战略与公司事务负责人Camilla Sylvest；执行副总裁兼北美业务负责人Doug Langa；执行副总裁兼开发负责人Martin Holst Lange；以及首席财务官Karsten Munk Knudsen。

Thank you. Welcome to this Novo Nordisk earnings call for the first six months of 2024. My name is Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode, and I'm the head of investor relations at Novo Nordisk. With me today, I have CEO of Novo Nordisk, Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen; executive vice president and head of commercial strategy and corporate affairs, Camilla Sylvest; executive vice president and head of North America operations, Doug Langa; executive vice president and head of development, Martin Holst Lange; and finally, chief financial officer, Karsten Munk Knudsen.

Please note that this call is being webcasted live, and a recording will be made available on our website as well. The call is scheduled to last one hour.

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen——总裁兼首席执行官

Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Jacob. Please turn to next slide. In the first six months, we delivered 25% sales growth and 19% operating profit growth, both at constant exchange rates. The operating profit growth was impacted by the impairment loss related to ocedurenone.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Jacob。请翻到下一页。在上半年，我们实现了25%的销售增长和19%的营业利润增长，两者均按固定汇率计算。营业利润增长受到与ocedurenone相关的减值损失的影响。

Thank you, Jacob. Please turn to next slide. In the first six months, we delivered 25% sales growth and 19% operating profit growth, both at constant exchange rates. The operating profit growth was impacted by the impairment loss related to ocedurenone.

pairs.en: I'd like to start this call by going through the performance highlights across our strategic aspirations before handing over the word to my colleagues. Starting with our focus on purpose and sustainability, we are now serving more than 42 million patients with our diabetes and obesity treatments. Our total carbon emissions rose by 31% as compared to the first six months of 2023. This was primarily driven by our increased investments in capital expenditure to meet the high demand for our products.
pairs.zh:
在开始本次电话会议前，我想先概述我们在战略目标方面的业绩亮点，之后再将发言权交给我的同事。首先从我们的使命和可持续发展重点来看，目前我们超过4200万患者正在使用我们的糖尿病及肥胖症治疗产品。与2023年上半年相比，我们的总碳排放量增长了31%，这主要是由于我们为满足产品高需求而增加了资本支出投资。

I'd like to start this call by going through the performance highlights across our strategic aspirations before handing over the word to my colleagues. Starting with our focus on purpose and sustainability, we are now serving more than 42 million patients with our diabetes and obesity treatments. Our total carbon emissions rose by 31% as compared to the first six months of 2023. This was primarily driven by our increased investments in capital expenditure to meet the high demand for our products.

pairs.en: To uphold our commitment to being a sustainable employer, we expanded the number of women in senior leadership positions to 41%, compared to 40% in the first six months of 2023. Across all leadership positions, 46% are held by women. Within R&D, we had a number of exciting readouts this quarter, including the positive Mim8 Phase 3 results. Martin will come back to this and our overall R&D milestones later.
pairs.zh:
为了履行我们作为可持续雇主的承诺，我们将在高级领导职位中的女性比例扩大至41%，而2023年上半年为40%。在所有领导职位中，46%由女性担任。在研发领域，本季度我们取得了多项令人振奋的成果，包括Mim8三期临床试验的积极结果。Martin稍后将对此以及我们的整体研发里程碑进行详细说明。

To uphold our commitment to being a sustainable employer, we expanded the number of women in senior leadership positions to 41%, compared to 40% in the first six months of 2023. Across all leadership positions, 46% are held by women. Within R&D, we had a number of exciting readouts this quarter, including the positive Mim8 Phase 3 results. Martin will come back to this and our overall R&D milestones later.

pairs.en: The quarterly sales growth reflects solid commercial execution across both operating units. The performance in the first six months has enabled us to raise our outlook for the full year. Camilla and Doug will go through the details later. Karsten will go through the financials, but I'm very please with our performance in the first six months of 2024.
pairs.zh:
季度销售增长反映了两个运营部门扎实的商业执行。上半年的业绩使我们能够提高全年展望。Camilla和Doug稍后将介绍细节，Karsten将讲解财务数据，但我对2024年上半年的表现非常满意。

The quarterly sales growth reflects solid commercial execution across both operating units. The performance in the first six months has enabled us to raise our outlook for the full year. Camilla and Doug will go through the details later. Karsten will go through the financials, but I'm very please with our performance in the first six months of 2024.

pairs.en: With that, I'll give the word to Camilla for an update on commercial execution.
pairs.zh:
那么，接下来有请Camilla介绍商业执行的最新情况。

With that, I'll give the word to Camilla for an update on commercial execution.

pairs.en: Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs
pairs.zh:
Camilla Sylvest——执行副总裁，商业战略与公司事务

Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs

pairs.en: Thank you, Lars, and please turn to the next slide. In the first six months of 2024, our total sales increased by 25% at constant exchange rates. The sales growth was driven by both operating units with North America operations growing 36% and international operations growing 11%. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross to net sales adjustments related to prior years.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Lars，请翻到下一页。2024年上半年，我们的总销售额按固定汇率计算增长了25%。销售增长由两个运营部门共同推动，北美业务增长36%，国际业务增长11%。在美国，销售增长受到与前几年相关的总销售额到净销售额调整的积极影响。

Thank you, Lars, and please turn to the next slide. In the first six months of 2024, our total sales increased by 25% at constant exchange rates. The sales growth was driven by both operating units with North America operations growing 36% and international operations growing 11%. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross to net sales adjustments related to prior years.

pairs.en: Our GLP-1 sales increased in diabetes by 32%, driven by North America operations growing 39% and international operations growing 20%. Insulin sales increased by 10%, driven by North America operations growing 36% and international operations growing 3%. Obesity care sales increased 37%, driven by North America growing 35% and international operations growing 47%. In international operations, we continue to roll out Wegovy gradually with volume cap launches to balance supply and demand.
pairs.zh:
我们的GLP-1糖尿病药物销售额增长了32%，其中北美业务增长39%，国际业务增长20%。胰岛素销售额增长了10%，北美业务增长36%，国际业务增长3%。肥胖症护理销售额增长了37%，北美增长35%，国际业务增长47%。在国际业务中，我们继续逐步推广Wegovy，并通过限制上市量来平衡供需。

Our GLP-1 sales increased in diabetes by 32%, driven by North America operations growing 39% and international operations growing 20%. Insulin sales increased by 10%, driven by North America operations growing 36% and international operations growing 3%. Obesity care sales increased 37%, driven by North America growing 35% and international operations growing 47%. In international operations, we continue to roll out Wegovy gradually with volume cap launches to balance supply and demand.

pairs.en: In both geographies, growth was driven by Wegovy, partly offset by declining Saxenda sales as the market is moving to once-weekly treatments, where disease sales decreased by 3%. Please turn to the next slide. With 25% sales growth in diabetes care, we are growing faster than the total diabetes market. As a result, our global diabetes value market share increased to 34.1%.
pairs.zh:
在这两个地区，增长主要由Wegovy推动，但部分被Saxenda销售额下降所抵消，因为市场正转向每周一次的治疗方案，其中相关疾病销售额下降了3%。请翻到下一页。在糖尿病护理领域，我们实现了25%的销售增长，增速超过整个糖尿病市场。因此，我们在全球糖尿病价值市场的份额升至34.1%。

In both geographies, growth was driven by Wegovy, partly offset by declining Saxenda sales as the market is moving to once-weekly treatments, where disease sales decreased by 3%. Please turn to the next slide. With 25% sales growth in diabetes care, we are growing faster than the total diabetes market. As a result, our global diabetes value market share increased to 34.1%.

pairs.en: This is above our strategic aspiration of reaching one-third of the global diabetes value market in 2025. The increase reflects market share gains in both North America operations and international operations. Please turn to the next slide. In international operations, diabetes care sales increased by 11% in the first six months of 2024, which was primarily driven by GLP-1 sales growing 20%.
pairs.zh:
这超出了我们到2025年占据全球糖尿病价值市场三分之一的战略目标。这一增长反映了北美业务和国际业务市场份额的提升。请翻到下一页。在国际业务中，2024年前六个月糖尿病护理销售额增长了11%，主要由GLP-1销售额增长20%所推动。

This is above our strategic aspiration of reaching one-third of the global diabetes value market in 2025. The increase reflects market share gains in both North America operations and international operations. Please turn to the next slide. In international operations, diabetes care sales increased by 11% in the first six months of 2024, which was primarily driven by GLP-1 sales growing 20%.

pairs.en: Novo Nordisk is the market leader in international operations with a GLP-1 value market share of 69%. Ozempic continues its GLP-1 market leadership with 46.6% market share. We're also pleased to see Rybelsus increasing its market share to more than 16%, driven by solid uptake across geographies. And with that, I will hand over to Doug.
pairs.zh:
Novo Nordisk是国际业务的市场领导者，其GLP-1市场价值份额为69%。Ozempic继续以46.6%的市场份额保持GLP-1市场的领导地位。我们也很高兴地看到Rybelsus的市场份额增长至超过16%，这得益于各地区市场的强劲推广。接下来，有请Doug。

Novo Nordisk is the market leader in international operations with a GLP-1 value market share of 69%. Ozempic continues its GLP-1 market leadership with 46.6% market share. We're also pleased to see Rybelsus increasing its market share to more than 16%, driven by solid uptake across geographies. And with that, I will hand over to Doug.

pairs.en: Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, North America Operations
pairs.zh:
Doug Langa——执行副总裁，北美运营  
Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, North America Operations

pairs.en: Thank you, Camilla. Please turn to the next slide. Sales in North America is driven by market share gains and healthy prescription volume growth of the GLP-1 class above 10% in the second quarter this year compared to the second quarter last year. Sales of GLP-1 diabetes care products in the U.S.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Camilla。请翻到下一页。北美地区的销售增长得益于市场份额的提升以及GLP-1类药物处方量的健康增长，与去年第二季度相比，今年第二季度增长率超过10%。美国GLP-1糖尿病护理产品的销售。

原文：
Thank you, Camilla. Please turn to the next slide. Sales in North America is driven by market share gains and healthy prescription volume growth of the GLP-1 class above 10% in the second quarter this year compared to the second quarter last year. Sales of GLP-1 diabetes care products in the U.S.

pairs.en: increased by 42% at constant exchange rates. The sales increase was mainly driven by continued uptake of Ozempic. Measured on total prescriptions, Novo Nordisk expands its market leadership, now with around 56% market share. Note that the sales growth of Ozempic was negatively impacted by periodic supply constraints in the beginning of the year.
pairs.zh:
按固定汇率计算，增长了42%。销售额增长主要得益于Ozempic的持续采用。以总处方量衡量，Novo Nordisk扩大了其市场领导地位，目前拥有约56%的市场份额。请注意，Ozempic的销售增长受到年初周期性供应限制的负面影响。

increased by 42% at constant exchange rates. The sales increase was mainly driven by continued uptake of Ozempic. Measured on total prescriptions, Novo Nordisk expands its market leadership, now with around 56% market share. Note that the sales growth of Ozempic was negatively impacted by periodic supply constraints in the beginning of the year.

pairs.en: Please go to the next slide. To safeguard continuity of care for Wegovy, we reduced the supply of the lower dose strengths in May of 2023, which continued throughout the remainder of last year. In the beginning of this year, we gradually started increasing the supply of the lower dose strengths, and I am pleased to see that this has been reflected in prescriptions, and we are now seeing more than double the number of prescriptions in the market compared to the beginning of the year. Further, while demand is still expected to exceed supply, we grow more confident in our ability to supply.
pairs.zh:
请翻到下一页。为确保Wegovy治疗的连续性，我们在2023年5月减少了较低剂量强度的供应，这一情况持续到去年年底。今年年初，我们逐步开始增加较低剂量强度的供应，我很高兴看到这已体现在处方量上，目前市场上的处方量比年初增加了一倍以上。此外，尽管需求预计仍将超过供应，但我们对自身的供应能力越来越有信心。

原文：
Please go to the next slide. To safeguard continuity of care for Wegovy, we reduced the supply of the lower dose strengths in May of 2023, which continued throughout the remainder of last year. In the beginning of this year, we gradually started increasing the supply of the lower dose strengths, and I am pleased to see that this has been reflected in prescriptions, and we are now seeing more than double the number of prescriptions in the market compared to the beginning of the year. Further, while demand is still expected to exceed supply, we grow more confident in our ability to supply.

pairs.en: We will continue to dynamicly manage supply, but only the initiation dose strength of 0.25 milligrams. Wegovy still has broad market access with coverage for more than 50 million people with obesity. And importantly, around 10 million vulnerable people with obesity now have access to Wegovy through channels such as Medicaid, which is now available in more than 20 states. Ultimately, our focus is to reach more patients living with obesity.
pairs.zh:
我们将继续动态管理供应，但仅针对起始剂量强度0.25毫克。Wegovy仍具有广泛的市场准入，覆盖超过5000万肥胖人群。重要的是，约1000万弱势肥胖人群现在可以通过Medicaid等渠道获得Wegovy，该渠道现已覆盖超过20个州。最终，我们的重点是覆盖更多肥胖患者。

We will continue to dynamicly manage supply, but only the initiation dose strength of 0.25 milligrams. Wegovy still has broad market access with coverage for more than 50 million people with obesity. And importantly, around 10 million vulnerable people with obesity now have access to Wegovy through channels such as Medicaid, which is now available in more than 20 states. Ultimately, our focus is to reach more patients living with obesity.

pairs.en: And as volumes go up, prices will come down. In the first six months of 2024, sales growth was driven by increased volumes, partially countered by lower realized prices. Next slide, please. Our rare disease sales decreased by 3%.
pairs.zh:
随着销量上升，价格将会下降。2024年前六个月，销售增长由销量增加推动，但部分被较低的实现价格所抵消。请看下一张幻灯片。我们的罕见病销售额下降了3%。

And as volumes go up, prices will come down. In the first six months of 2024, sales growth was driven by increased volumes, partially countered by lower realized prices. Next slide, please. Our rare disease sales decreased by 3%.

pairs.en: Sales in international operations declined by 14%. This was partly offset by a 13% sales increase in North America operations, reflecting the Sogroya launch and positive gross to net adjustments related to prior years in the U.S. Rare blood disorders sales decreased by 2%, driven by 2%, driven by lower NovoSeven and hemophilia A sales. This was partially countered by increased hemophilia B sales.
pairs.zh:
国际业务的销售额下降了14%。北美业务的销售额增长了13%，部分抵消了这一下降，这反映了Sogroya的推出以及美国与往年相关的正向从毛到净的调整。罕见血液疾病销售额下降了2%，其驱动因素是2%——由NovoSeven和血友病A销售额下降驱动。血友病B销售额的增长部分抵消了这一下降。

Sales in international operations declined by 14%. This was partly offset by a 13% sales increase in North America operations, reflecting the Sogroya launch and positive gross to net adjustments related to prior years in the U.S. Rare blood disorders sales decreased by 2%, driven by 2%, driven by lower NovoSeven and hemophilia A sales. This was partially countered by increased hemophilia B sales.

pairs.en: Rare endocrine disorders sales decreased by 8%. We are working on reestablishing full supply capacity of rare endocrine disorder products following a reduction of manufacturing output. Now, over to you, Martin, for an update on R&D.
pairs.zh:
罕见内分泌疾病销售额下降8%。我们正致力于在制造产出减少后，重建罕见内分泌疾病产品的全面供应能力。接下来，有请Martin介绍研发方面的最新进展。

Rare endocrine disorders sales decreased by 8%. We are working on reestablishing full supply capacity of rare endocrine disorder products following a reduction of manufacturing output. Now, over to you, Martin, for an update on R&D.

pairs.en: Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development
pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Thank you, Doug. Please turn to the next slide. I'm very pleased to share the results of the FRONTIER 2 Phase 3 trial with Mim8, which we have provided headline results for back in May. The full data set was also disclosed at the ISTH in June.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Doug。请翻到下一页。我很高兴与大家分享Mim8的FRONTIER 2三期临床试验结果，我们早在5月份就已公布了该试验的主要数据。完整数据集也在6月份的ISTH会议上进行了披露。

Thank you, Doug. Please turn to the next slide. I'm very pleased to share the results of the FRONTIER 2 Phase 3 trial with Mim8, which we have provided headline results for back in May. The full data set was also disclosed at the ISTH in June.

pairs.en: Before I walk you through the results, I would like to briefly remind you of the innovative clinical trial design. FRONTIER 2 was a pivotal Phase 3 26-week open-label randomized controlled and multi-arm trial. The trial investigated the efficacy and safety of once-weekly and once-monthly subcutaneous Mim8 versus no previous prophylaxis treatment or on-demand treatment and versus prior coagulation factor prophylaxis treatment. Two hundred and fifty-four people aged 12 years and older with hemophilia A, with or without inhibitors, were included in the trial.
pairs.zh:
在我向您介绍结果之前，我想先简要提醒您这个创新的临床试验设计。FRONTIER 2是一项关键性的3期、26周开放标签随机对照多臂试验。该试验研究了每周一次和每月一次皮下注射Mim8对比无预防治疗或按需治疗，以及对比既往凝血因子预防治疗的有效性和安全性。试验纳入了254名年龄在12岁及以上、伴或不伴抑制物的血友病A患者。

Before I walk you through the results, I would like to briefly remind you of the innovative clinical trial design. FRONTIER 2 was a pivotal Phase 3 26-week open-label randomized controlled and multi-arm trial. The trial investigated the efficacy and safety of once-weekly and once-monthly subcutaneous Mim8 versus no previous prophylaxis treatment or on-demand treatment and versus prior coagulation factor prophylaxis treatment. Two hundred and fifty-four people aged 12 years and older with hemophilia A, with or without inhibitors, were included in the trial.

pairs.en: The co-primary endpoint was mean annualized bleeding rate for treated bleeds for both once-weekly and once-monthly Mim8 versus on-demand treatment and versus prior coagulation factor prophylaxis treatment. Please turn to the next slide. Overall, in FRONTIER 2, Mim8 demonstrated superiority of Mim8 prophylaxis with both weekly and monthly dosing. In the on-demand treatment population, Mim8 demonstrated superior reductions of 97% and 99%, an estimated mean annualized bleeding rate for once-weekly and once-monthly treatment, respectively.
pairs.zh:
共同主要终点是每周一次和每月一次Mim8治疗出血的年化平均出血率，与按需治疗以及既往凝血因子预防治疗进行比较。请翻到下一页。总体而言，在FRONTIER 2试验中，Mim8预防治疗在每周和每月给药方案上均显示出优越性。在按需治疗人群中，Mim8分别实现了97%和99%的出血率降低，即每周一次和每月一次治疗的年化平均出血率估计值。

The co-primary endpoint was mean annualized bleeding rate for treated bleeds for both once-weekly and once-monthly Mim8 versus on-demand treatment and versus prior coagulation factor prophylaxis treatment. Please turn to the next slide. Overall, in FRONTIER 2, Mim8 demonstrated superiority of Mim8 prophylaxis with both weekly and monthly dosing. In the on-demand treatment population, Mim8 demonstrated superior reductions of 97% and 99%, an estimated mean annualized bleeding rate for once-weekly and once-monthly treatment, respectively.

pairs.en: This was compared to those receiving continued on-demand treatment. In the intra-patient comparison, in people with prior coagulation factor prophylaxis, Mim8 demonstrated superior reductions of 48% and 43% in estimated mean annual bleeding rates for once-weekly and once-monthly treatment, respectively. Of note, in the population with prior on-demand treatment, 86% and 95% of people receiving once-weekly and once-monthly Mim8 treatment, respectively, experienced zero treated bleeds. In the population with prior coagulation factor prophylaxis, 66% and 65% of people receiving once-weekly and once-monthly Mim8, respectively, had zero bleeds.
pairs.zh:
与继续接受按需治疗的患者相比。在患者自身对照中，对于既往接受过凝血因子预防性治疗的患者，Mim8在每周一次和每月一次治疗方案下，估计年均出血率分别显著降低48%和43%。值得注意的是，在既往接受按需治疗的人群中，接受Mim8每周一次和每月一次治疗的患者分别有86%和95%未出现需要治疗的出血事件。在既往接受凝血因子预防性治疗的人群中，接受Mim8每周一次和每月一次治疗的患者分别有66%和65%未出现出血事件。

This was compared to those receiving continued on-demand treatment. In the intra-patient comparison, in people with prior coagulation factor prophylaxis, Mim8 demonstrated superior reductions of 48% and 43% in estimated mean annual bleeding rates for once-weekly and once-monthly treatment, respectively. Of note, in the population with prior on-demand treatment, 86% and 95% of people receiving once-weekly and once-monthly Mim8 treatment, respectively, experienced zero treated bleeds. In the population with prior coagulation factor prophylaxis, 66% and 65% of people receiving once-weekly and once-monthly Mim8, respectively, had zero bleeds.

pairs.en: In the trial, Mim8 appear to have a safe and well-tolerated profile with no thromboembolic events observed and no evidence of neutralizing anti-Mim8 antibodies. Further, only five to 10 -- sorry, 5% to 12% of patients experienced injection site reactions across all five treatment arms. In conclusion, we are very excited about the FRONTIER 2 results. Given the differing needs of people living with hemophilia A at once-weekly or a once-monthly dosing provides optionality and flexibility for people living with hemophilia A with and without inhibitors.
pairs.zh:
在试验中，Mim8显示出安全性良好且耐受性佳的特征，未观察到血栓栓塞事件，也未发现中和性抗Mim8抗体。此外，在所有五个治疗组中，仅有5%到12%的患者出现注射部位反应。总之，我们对FRONTIER 2试验结果感到非常兴奋。考虑到血友病A患者的不同需求，每周一次或每月一次的给药方案为伴或不伴抑制物的血友病A患者提供了选择性和灵活性。

In the trial, Mim8 appear to have a safe and well-tolerated profile with no thromboembolic events observed and no evidence of neutralizing anti-Mim8 antibodies. Further, only five to 10 -- sorry, 5% to 12% of patients experienced injection site reactions across all five treatment arms. In conclusion, we are very excited about the FRONTIER 2 results. Given the differing needs of people living with hemophilia A at once-weekly or a once-monthly dosing provides optionality and flexibility for people living with hemophilia A with and without inhibitors.

pairs.en: We now expect to file for first regulatory approval of Mim8 during the first half of 2025. Next slide, please. Turning to diabetes. I would also like to share the results from the COMBINE 1 trial, which investigated the use of once-weekly IcoSema, a combination of once-weekly insulin Icodec and once-weekly Semaglutide in people with Type 2 diabetes.
pairs.zh:
我们现在预计将在2025年上半年首次提交Mim8的监管审批申请。请翻到下一页。接下来谈谈糖尿病。我还想分享COMBINE 1试验的结果，该试验研究了每周一次的IcoSema（每周一次的胰岛素Icodec和每周一次的Semaglutide的复方制剂）在2型糖尿病患者中的应用。

We now expect to file for first regulatory approval of Mim8 during the first half of 2025. Next slide, please. Turning to diabetes. I would also like to share the results from the COMBINE 1 trial, which investigated the use of once-weekly IcoSema, a combination of once-weekly insulin Icodec and once-weekly Semaglutide in people with Type 2 diabetes.

pairs.en: The objective of the 52-week trial was to assess the efficacy and safety of switching to once-weekly IcoSema compared to once-weekly insulin Icodec alone in people with Type 2 diabetes inadequately controlled on a daily basal insulin with or without oral anti-diabetic drugs. The trial achieved its primary endpoint with IcoSema demonstrating superiority in reducing A1C at week 52 with once-weekly IcoSema compared with insulin Icodec. From an overall HbA1c base line of 8.2%, IcoSema achieved an estimated reduction in A1c of 1.6 percentage points compared to 0.9 percentage points for insulin Icodec. People in the trial had a baseline body weight of 48 -- sorry, 84.5 kilograms.
pairs.zh:
这项为期52周的试验旨在评估对于使用每日基础胰岛素（联合或不联合口服降糖药）血糖控制不佳的2型糖尿病患者，转为每周一次IcoSema与每周一次胰岛素Icodec单药治疗相比的疗效和安全性。试验达到了主要终点，显示在第52周时，每周一次IcoSema在降低A1C方面优于胰岛素Icodec。在总体HbA1c基线为8.2%的基础上，IcoSema使A1c估计降低1.6个百分点，而胰岛素Icodec降低0.9个百分点。参与试验的患者基线体重为84.5公斤。

The objective of the 52-week trial was to assess the efficacy and safety of switching to once-weekly IcoSema compared to once-weekly insulin Icodec alone in people with Type 2 diabetes inadequately controlled on a daily basal insulin with or without oral anti-diabetic drugs. The trial achieved its primary endpoint with IcoSema demonstrating superiority in reducing A1C at week 52 with once-weekly IcoSema compared with insulin Icodec. From an overall HbA1c base line of 8.2%, IcoSema achieved an estimated reduction in A1c of 1.6 percentage points compared to 0.9 percentage points for insulin Icodec. People in the trial had a baseline body weight of 48 -- sorry, 84.5 kilograms.

pairs.en: Treatment with IcoSema achieved a superior change in body weight with a weight loss of 3.7 kilograms, compared with a 1.9 kilograms weight gain with insulin Icodec. The estimated treatment difference was 5.6 kilograms. In the trial, the rate of clinically significant or severe hypoglycemia was typically significantly lower with IcoSema at 0.14 events per patient years of exposure versus 0.63 events per patient year of exposure with once-weekly insulin Icodec. In the trial, once-weekly IcoSema appeared to have a safe and well-tolerated profile.
pairs.zh:
使用IcoSema治疗的患者体重变化更优，体重减轻3.7公斤，而使用Icodec胰岛素的患者体重增加1.9公斤。估计治疗差异为5.6公斤。在该试验中，IcoSema组临床显著性低血糖或严重低血糖的发生率显著更低，为每患者年0.14次事件，而每周一次Icodec胰岛素组为每患者年0.63次事件。该试验中，每周一次IcoSema显示出安全且耐受性良好的特征。

Treatment with IcoSema achieved a superior change in body weight with a weight loss of 3.7 kilograms, compared with a 1.9 kilograms weight gain with insulin Icodec. The estimated treatment difference was 5.6 kilograms. In the trial, the rate of clinically significant or severe hypoglycemia was typically significantly lower with IcoSema at 0.14 events per patient years of exposure versus 0.63 events per patient year of exposure with once-weekly insulin Icodec. In the trial, once-weekly IcoSema appeared to have a safe and well-tolerated profile.

pairs.en: Now that the third and last pivotal Phase 3 trial is completed, we expect to file for regulatory approval of IcoSema during the second half of 2024. Next slide, please. Now, I would like to highlight some of the additional exciting R&D news, including trial readouts and initiations anticipated for the rest of the year. Within diabetes, insulin Icodec under the brand name Awiqli has been approved in multiple countries.
pairs.zh:
随着第三项也是最后一项关键3期试验完成，我们预计将在2024年下半年提交IcoSema的监管审批申请。请翻到下一页。现在，我想重点介绍一些其他令人兴奋的研发动态，包括今年剩余时间预计会公布的试验结果和启动的新项目。在糖尿病领域，以Awiqli为品牌名的胰岛素Icodec已在多个国家获批。

Now that the third and last pivotal Phase 3 trial is completed, we expect to file for regulatory approval of IcoSema during the second half of 2024. Next slide, please. Now, I would like to highlight some of the additional exciting R&D news, including trial readouts and initiations anticipated for the rest of the year. Within diabetes, insulin Icodec under the brand name Awiqli has been approved in multiple countries.

pairs.en: In the U.S., however, we are disappointed to have received a complete response letter from the FDA for insulin Icodec. The letter outlined request related to the manufacturing process and the Type 2 -- sorry, the Type 1 diabetes indication before the application review could be completed. We're evaluating the content of the CRL, and we'll work closely with the FDA to fulfill their requests. We do not expect to be able to fulfill the request during 2024.
pairs.zh:
然而在美国，我们遗憾地收到了FDA关于胰岛素Icodec的完整回复函。该函件指出了在完成申请审查前，针对生产工艺以及2型——抱歉，1型糖尿病适应症方面需要处理的要求。我们正在评估CRL的内容，并将与FDA密切合作以满足其要求。我们不期望能在2024年内完成这些要求。

In the U.S., however, we are disappointed to have received a complete response letter from the FDA for insulin Icodec. The letter outlined request related to the manufacturing process and the Type 2 -- sorry, the Type 1 diabetes indication before the application review could be completed. We're evaluating the content of the CRL, and we'll work closely with the FDA to fulfill their requests. We do not expect to be able to fulfill the request during 2024.

pairs.en: In the first half of this year, the flow data were submitted as a label expansion application to the FDA in the U.S. and to the European regulatory authorities. Submissions to regulatory authorities in Japan and China are expected in the second half of 2024. Additionally, in the second half of this year, we are expected to see the readout of the STRIDE outcomes trial with Ozempic 1.0 milligram in peripheral artery disease.
pairs.zh:
今年上半年，该flow数据作为标签扩展申请提交给了美国FDA和欧洲监管机构。预计将于2024年下半年提交给日本和中国的监管机构。此外，在今年下半年，我们预计将看到Ozempic 1.0毫克在外周动脉疾病中的STRIDE outcomes试验的结果。

In the first half of this year, the flow data were submitted as a label expansion application to the FDA in the U.S. and to the European regulatory authorities. Submissions to regulatory authorities in Japan and China are expected in the second half of 2024. Additionally, in the second half of this year, we are expected to see the readout of the STRIDE outcomes trial with Ozempic 1.0 milligram in peripheral artery disease.

pairs.en: Further, we also expect readout of the sole cardiovascular outcomes trial with the Rybelsus 14 milligram. Both trials are expected to further strengthen the comprehensive cardiometabolic evidence that we have for semaglutide. Also in the second half of the year, we look forward to initiate a Phase 2 study for Amycretin, demonstrating our commitment to continuously raising the innovation behind diabetes. Moving to obesity care.
pairs.zh:
此外，我们还期待Rybelsus 14毫克唯一的心血管结局试验的结果。这两项试验预计将进一步巩固我们已有的semaglutide的全面心代谢证据。同样在今年下半年，我们期待启动Amycretin的2期研究，展示我们持续推动糖尿病背后创新的承诺。转向肥胖护理。

原文：
Further, we also expect readout of the sole cardiovascular outcomes trial with the Rybelsus 14 milligram. Both trials are expected to further strengthen the comprehensive cardiometabolic evidence that we have for semaglutide. Also in the second half of the year, we look forward to initiate a Phase 2 study for Amycretin, demonstrating our commitment to continuously raising the innovation behind diabetes. Moving to obesity care.

pairs.en: In the second quarter, we successfully completed the OASIS 4 trial. OASIS 4 investigated once-daily semaglutide 25 milligram for weight management in add-ons with obesity or overweight with one or more comorbidities. The trial achieved its primary endpoint with oral semaglutide 25 milligram demonstrating superiority compared to placebo with respect to change in body weight. From a baseline body weight of 105.9 kilograms, oral semaglutide 25 milligram achieved a 13.6% reduction, compared to 2.2% reduction with placebo.
pairs.zh:
在第二季度，我们成功完成了OASIS 4试验。OASIS 4研究了每日一次的口服semaglutide 25毫克用于肥胖或超重伴有一种或多种合并症的体重管理。该试验达到了主要终点，口服semaglutide 25毫克在体重变化方面显示出优于安慰剂的疗效。从基线体重105.9公斤开始，口服semaglutide 25毫克实现了13.6%的降幅，而安慰剂组仅为2.2%。

In the second quarter, we successfully completed the OASIS 4 trial. OASIS 4 investigated once-daily semaglutide 25 milligram for weight management in add-ons with obesity or overweight with one or more comorbidities. The trial achieved its primary endpoint with oral semaglutide 25 milligram demonstrating superiority compared to placebo with respect to change in body weight. From a baseline body weight of 105.9 kilograms, oral semaglutide 25 milligram achieved a 13.6% reduction, compared to 2.2% reduction with placebo.

pairs.en: The global launch of oral semaglutide 25 milligram is contingent on portfolio prioritization and manufacturing capacity. For Wegovy, we received regulatory approval for the treatment of obesity or overweight in China. And in the EU, the EMA adopted a positive opinion for an update of the Wegovy label to reflect data from the SELECT trial. The SELECT cardiovascular outcome trial demonstrated that Wegovy statistically significantly reduced the risk of major adverse cardiovascular events by 20% compared to placebo.
pairs.zh:
口服semaglutide 25毫克的全球上市取决于产品组合优先顺序和生产能力。对于Wegovy，我们已在中国获得用于治疗肥胖或超重的监管批准。在欧盟，EMA通过了积极意见，支持更新Wegovy标签以纳入SELECT试验的数据。SELECT心血管结局试验显示，与安慰剂相比，Wegovy将主要不良心血管事件的风险统计学上显著降低了20%。

The global launch of oral semaglutide 25 milligram is contingent on portfolio prioritization and manufacturing capacity. For Wegovy, we received regulatory approval for the treatment of obesity or overweight in China. And in the EU, the EMA adopted a positive opinion for an update of the Wegovy label to reflect data from the SELECT trial. The SELECT cardiovascular outcome trial demonstrated that Wegovy statistically significantly reduced the risk of major adverse cardiovascular events by 20% compared to placebo.

pairs.en: The label update will also include SELECT data showing a numerical risk reduction in cardiovascular death by 15%, a significant risk reduction of death from any cause by 19%, as well as a significant risk reduction of 18% in heart failure composite endpoints. Last for Wegovy, based on interactions with the FDA, we have decided to withdraw the results from the STEP-HFpEF trials for regulatory review in the U.S. and EU to further substantiate the likelihood of getting hard endpoints into the label update. We now expect to resubmit the file in the beginning of 2025 with additional relevant data.
pairs.zh:
标签更新还将包含SELECT数据，显示心血管死亡风险降低15%，全因死亡风险显著降低19%，以及心力衰竭复合终点风险显著降低18%。最后，对于Wegovy，根据与FDA的沟通，我们决定撤回STEP-HFpEF试验结果，以进行美国和欧盟的监管审查，从而进一步证实将硬终点纳入标签更新的可能性。我们预计将在2025年初重新提交文件，并补充相关数据。

The label update will also include SELECT data showing a numerical risk reduction in cardiovascular death by 15%, a significant risk reduction of death from any cause by 19%, as well as a significant risk reduction of 18% in heart failure composite endpoints. Last for Wegovy, based on interactions with the FDA, we have decided to withdraw the results from the STEP-HFpEF trials for regulatory review in the U.S. and EU to further substantiate the likelihood of getting hard endpoints into the label update. We now expect to resubmit the file in the beginning of 2025 with additional relevant data.

pairs.en: We remain excited about the potential of semaglutide 2.4 milligram in this population, given the data that we've seen from the two completed STEP-HFpEF trials. Looking ahead, we are in the second half, expecting Phase 2 results for Monlunabant, as well as Phase 3 results for the STEP-HFpEF trial with semaglutide 7.2 milligram around the turn of the year. Lastly, we anticipate first Phase 3 results for REDEFINE 1 with CagriSema in obesity. With all of this activity, we are confident with the progress we are making toward developing superior treatment solutions for people with obesity.
pairs.zh:
我们对semaglutide 2.4毫克在这类人群中的潜力仍感到兴奋，这得益于从已完成的两项STEP-HFpEF试验中看到的数据。展望未来，我们目前已进入下半年，预计将在年底前后获得Monlunabant的二期结果，以及semaglutide 7.2毫克STEP-HFpEF试验的三期结果。最后，我们预计将在肥胖症领域获得CagriSema的REDEFINE 1试验首批三期结果。基于所有这些进展，我们对为肥胖患者开发更优治疗方案所取得的进展充满信心。

We remain excited about the potential of semaglutide 2.4 milligram in this population, given the data that we've seen from the two completed STEP-HFpEF trials. Looking ahead, we are in the second half, expecting Phase 2 results for Monlunabant, as well as Phase 3 results for the STEP-HFpEF trial with semaglutide 7.2 milligram around the turn of the year. Lastly, we anticipate first Phase 3 results for REDEFINE 1 with CagriSema in obesity. With all of this activity, we are confident with the progress we are making toward developing superior treatment solutions for people with obesity.

pairs.en: Within cardiovascular and emerging therapy areas, we, in June 2024, announced that the CLARION-CKD Phase 3 trial involving Ocedurenone was terminated. This was based on an interim analysis performed by an independent monitoring committee that concluded that the trial met the prespecified futility criteria, meaning that the trial, unfortunately, did not meet its primary end point. We have initiated a randomized and placebo-controlled Phase 3 -- cardiovascular outcomes trial called the ARTEMIS. The trial will assess the efficacy and safety of Ziltivekimab 15 milligram in acute myocardial infarction.
pairs.zh:
在心血管和新兴治疗领域，我们于2024年6月宣布，涉及Ocedurenone的CLARION-CKD 3期试验已终止。这是基于独立监测委员会进行的中期分析，该分析得出结论，试验达到了预设的无效性标准，意味着该试验遗憾地未达到其主要终点。我们已启动一项名为ARTEMIS的随机、安慰剂对照3期心血管结局试验。该试验将评估Ziltivekimab 15毫克在急性心肌梗死中的疗效和安全性。

Within cardiovascular and emerging therapy areas, we, in June 2024, announced that the CLARION-CKD Phase 3 trial involving Ocedurenone was terminated. This was based on an interim analysis performed by an independent monitoring committee that concluded that the trial met the prespecified futility criteria, meaning that the trial, unfortunately, did not meet its primary end point. We have initiated a randomized and placebo-controlled Phase 3 -- cardiovascular outcomes trial called the ARTEMIS. The trial will assess the efficacy and safety of Ziltivekimab 15 milligram in acute myocardial infarction.

pairs.en: Lastly, we look much forward to the Phase 3 readout of the ESSENCE trial, investigating semaglutide 2.4 milligram in MASH. With that, over to you, Karsten.
pairs.zh:
最后，我们非常期待ESSENCE试验的三期结果，该试验正在调查2.4毫克semaglutide在MASH中的疗效。接下来，有请Karsten。

Lastly, we look much forward to the Phase 3 readout of the ESSENCE trial, investigating semaglutide 2.4 milligram in MASH. With that, over to you, Karsten.

pairs.en: Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Karsten Munk Knudsen——执行副总裁、首席财务官

Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Martin. Please turn to the next slide. In the first six months of 2024, our sales grew by 24% in Danish kroner and 25% at constant exchange rates, driven by both operating units. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross to net sales adjustments related to prior years.
pairs.zh:
感谢你，Martin。请翻到下一页幻灯片。2024年上半年，我们的销售额以Danish kroner计增长了24%，按固定汇率计算增长了25%，这得益于两个业务部门的推动。在美国，销售额增长受到了与往年相关的总额与净销售额调整的积极影响。

Thank you, Martin. Please turn to the next slide. In the first six months of 2024, our sales grew by 24% in Danish kroner and 25% at constant exchange rates, driven by both operating units. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross to net sales adjustments related to prior years.

pairs.en: The gross margin decreased to 84.9%, compared to 85.1% in 2023. The decline is mainly driven by increased costs related to ongoing capacity expansions. This is partially countered by a positive price impact from gross to net adjustments related to prior years in the U.S. in addition to positive product mix, reflecting increased sales of GLP-1-based treatments.
pairs.zh:
毛利率下降至84.9%，而2023年为85.1%。这一下降主要是由于持续产能扩张相关成本增加所致。部分被美国往年毛净调整带来的积极价格影响以及积极的产品组合所抵消，反映了基于GLP-1的治疗药物销售的增长。

The gross margin decreased to 84.9%, compared to 85.1% in 2023. The decline is mainly driven by increased costs related to ongoing capacity expansions. This is partially countered by a positive price impact from gross to net adjustments related to prior years in the U.S. in addition to positive product mix, reflecting increased sales of GLP-1-based treatments.

pairs.en: Sales and distribution costs increased by 5% in Danish kroner and by 6% at constant exchange rates. The increase in sales and distribution costs is impacted by adjustments to legal provisions in the second quarter of 2023. In North America operations, the cost increase is mainly driven by promotional activities related to Wegovy. While in international operations, the increase is mainly related to promotional activities for Rybelsus, as well as obesity care market development activities.
pairs.zh:
销售和分销成本以丹麦克朗计增长了5%，按固定汇率计算增长了6%。销售和分销成本的增加受到2023年第二季度法律条款调整的影响。在北美业务中，成本增加主要由与Wegovy相关的促销活动推动。而在国际业务中，增加主要与Rybelsus的促销活动以及肥胖护理市场开发活动有关。

Sales and distribution costs increased by 5% in Danish kroner and by 6% at constant exchange rates. The increase in sales and distribution costs is impacted by adjustments to legal provisions in the second quarter of 2023. In North America operations, the cost increase is mainly driven by promotional activities related to Wegovy. While in international operations, the increase is mainly related to promotional activities for Rybelsus, as well as obesity care market development activities.

pairs.en: Research and development costs increased by 79% measured in Danish kroner and by 78% at constant exchange rates. The increase in cost is mainly driven by increased late-stage clinical trial activity and increased early research activities, as well as the impairment related to ocedurenone of 5.7 billion Danish kroner and other impairments of intangible assets. Administration costs increased by 8%, measured both in Danish kroner and constant exchange rates. Operating profit increased by 18% measured in Danish kroner and by 19% at constant exchange rates.
pairs.zh:
以丹麦克朗计算，研发成本增长了79%，按固定汇率计算增长了78%。成本增加主要来自后期临床试验活动增加、早期研究活动增加，以及与ocedurenone相关的57亿丹麦克朗减值和其他无形资产减值。以丹麦克朗和固定汇率计算，管理成本均增长了8%。以丹麦克朗计算，营业利润增长了18%，按固定汇率计算增长了19%。

原文：
Research and development costs increased by 79% measured in Danish kroner and by 78% at constant exchange rates. The increase in cost is mainly driven by increased late-stage clinical trial activity and increased early research activities, as well as the impairment related to ocedurenone of 5.7 billion Danish kroner and other impairments of intangible assets. Administration costs increased by 8%, measured both in Danish kroner and constant exchange rates. Operating profit increased by 18% measured in Danish kroner and by 19% at constant exchange rates.

pairs.en: Operating profit is impacted by the impairment loss related to ocedurenone of 5.7 billion Danish kroner. Net financial items showed a net loss of 530 million Danish kroner, compared to a net gain of 96 million Danish kroner last year, mainly reflecting hedging losses on the U.S. dollar. The effective tax rate was 20.6% in the first six months of 2024, compared to 19.9% in the first six months of 2023.
pairs.zh:
营业利润受到与ocedurenone相关的57亿丹麦克朗减值损失的影响。净财务项目显示净亏损5.3亿丹麦克朗，而去年为净收益9600万丹麦克朗，主要反映了对美元的套期保值损失。2024年上半年有效税率为20.6%，而2023年上半年为19.9%。

Operating profit is impacted by the impairment loss related to ocedurenone of 5.7 billion Danish kroner. Net financial items showed a net loss of 530 million Danish kroner, compared to a net gain of 96 million Danish kroner last year, mainly reflecting hedging losses on the U.S. dollar. The effective tax rate was 20.6% in the first six months of 2024, compared to 19.9% in the first six months of 2023.

pairs.en: Net profit increased by 16%, and diluted earnings per share increased by 17% to 10.17 kroner. Net profit is negatively impacted by the 5.7 billion Danish kroner impairment of ocedurenone. Free cash flow realized in first half of 2024 was 41.3 billion Danish kroner, compared to 45.5 billion in the first six months of 2023. The lower free cash flow reflects increasing capital expenditure as well as acquisition of intangible assets.
pairs.zh:
净利润增长16%，稀释后每股收益增长17%至10.17克朗。净利润受到ocedurenone减值57亿丹麦克朗的负面影响。2024年上半年实现自由现金流413亿丹麦克朗，而2023年上半年为455亿丹麦克朗。自由现金流下降反映了资本支出增加以及无形资产收购。

Net profit increased by 16%, and diluted earnings per share increased by 17% to 10.17 kroner. Net profit is negatively impacted by the 5.7 billion Danish kroner impairment of ocedurenone. Free cash flow realized in first half of 2024 was 41.3 billion Danish kroner, compared to 45.5 billion in the first six months of 2023. The lower free cash flow reflects increasing capital expenditure as well as acquisition of intangible assets.

pairs.en: This is partly countered by net cash generated from operating activities. The impairment of the intangible asset of ocedurenone of 5.7 billion Danish kroner has no impact on free cash flow. Capital expenditure for property, plant, and equipment was 18.9 billion Danish kroner, compared to 10.6 billion Danish kroner in 2023. This was primarily driven by investments in additional capacity for API production and fill-finish capacity for both current and future injectable and oral products.
pairs.zh:
这部分被经营活动产生的净现金所抵消。ocedurenone的无形资产减值5.7 billion Danish kroner对自由现金流没有影响。物业、厂房及设备的资本支出为18.9 billion Danish kroner，而2023年为10.6 billion Danish kroner。这主要是由于对API生产额外产能以及当前和未来注射及口服产品的灌装完成产能的投资所致。

This is partly countered by net cash generated from operating activities. The impairment of the intangible asset of ocedurenone of 5.7 billion Danish kroner has no impact on free cash flow. Capital expenditure for property, plant, and equipment was 18.9 billion Danish kroner, compared to 10.6 billion Danish kroner in 2023. This was primarily driven by investments in additional capacity for API production and fill-finish capacity for both current and future injectable and oral products.

pairs.en: Please go to the next slide. A key priority for Novo Nordisk is to ensure attractive allocation of capital to shareholders. For 2023, the total dividend per share increased 51.6% to 9.40 kroner. For 2024, the board of directors has decided to pay out an interim dividend of 3.50 kroner per share, which will be paid out in August of this year.
pairs.zh:
请翻到下一页。Novo Nordisk的一个关键优先事项是确保为股东提供有吸引力的资本分配。2023年，每股总股息增长51.6%，达到9.40克朗。2024年，董事会决定支付每股3.50克朗的中期股息，将于今年8月发放。

Please go to the next slide. A key priority for Novo Nordisk is to ensure attractive allocation of capital to shareholders. For 2023, the total dividend per share increased 51.6% to 9.40 kroner. For 2024, the board of directors has decided to pay out an interim dividend of 3.50 kroner per share, which will be paid out in August of this year.

pairs.en: We have returned more than 38 billion Danish kroner to shareholders through dividends and share buybacks in the first six months of 2024. Our ongoing repurchase program for the full year amounts to -- up to 20 billion Danish kroner, a reduction from 30 billion Danish kroner allocated last year. This allocation aligns with our strategic capital allocation strategy for Novo Nordisk. We prioritize investing in internal growth opportunities, returning capital to shareholders through dividends, and business development activities.
pairs.zh:
我们在2024年上半年通过股息和股票回购向股东返还了超过380亿丹麦克朗。我们全年的持续回购计划金额高达200亿丹麦克朗，较去年分配的300亿丹麦克朗有所减少。这一分配符合我们为Novo Nordisk制定的战略资本配置策略。我们优先投资于内部增长机会、通过股息向股东返还资本以及业务发展活动。

We have returned more than 38 billion Danish kroner to shareholders through dividends and share buybacks in the first six months of 2024. Our ongoing repurchase program for the full year amounts to -- up to 20 billion Danish kroner, a reduction from 30 billion Danish kroner allocated last year. This allocation aligns with our strategic capital allocation strategy for Novo Nordisk. We prioritize investing in internal growth opportunities, returning capital to shareholders through dividends, and business development activities.

pairs.en: Finally, we look toward share buyback program as a flexible measure contingent on the first three priorities to distribute excess cash. We continued the growth momentum in 2024 and have raised our sales growth outlook to between 22% and 28% at constant exchange rates. The updated sales outlook at constant exchange rates reflects higher full-year expectations for both operating units. The guidance reflects expectations for sales growth in both North America operations and international operations, mainly driven by volume growth of GLP-1-based treatments for obesity and diabetes care.
pairs.zh:
最后，我们将股票回购计划视为一种灵活措施，取决于前三个优先事项，以分配超额现金。我们在2024年继续保持增长势头，并将以固定汇率计算的销售增长展望上调至22%至28%。更新后的固定汇率销售展望反映了对两个运营单位全年更高预期的调整。这一指引反映了对北美业务和国际业务销售增长的预期，主要受基于GLP-1的肥胖和糖尿病治疗药物销量增长的推动。

Finally, we look toward share buyback program as a flexible measure contingent on the first three priorities to distribute excess cash. We continued the growth momentum in 2024 and have raised our sales growth outlook to between 22% and 28% at constant exchange rates. The updated sales outlook at constant exchange rates reflects higher full-year expectations for both operating units. The guidance reflects expectations for sales growth in both North America operations and international operations, mainly driven by volume growth of GLP-1-based treatments for obesity and diabetes care.

pairs.en: With the expectation of continued volume growth and capacity limitations at some manufacturing sites, the outlook also reflects expected continued periodic supply constraints and related drug shortage notifications across a number of products and geographies. Novo Nordisk is investing in internal and external capacity to increase supply, both short and long term. Operating profit growth outlook is now expected to be between 20% and 28% at constant exchange rates. The updated expectation reflects the impairment loss reflected to ocedurenone communicated in June of negative 6 percentage point.
pairs.zh:
随着持续销量增长的预期以及部分制造基地的产能限制，该展望也反映了预期中多个产品和地区将持续出现的周期性供应限制及相关药品短缺通知。Novo Nordisk正在投资内部和外部产能以增加供应，包括短期和长期。按固定汇率计算，营业利润增长展望目前预计在20%至28%之间。更新后的展望反映了6月份公布的ocedurenone减值损失影响，为负6个百分点。

原文：With the expectation of continued volume growth and capacity limitations at some manufacturing sites, the outlook also reflects expected continued periodic supply constraints and related drug shortage notifications across a number of products and geographies. Novo Nordisk is investing in internal and external capacity to increase supply, both short and long term. Operating profit growth outlook is now expected to be between 20% and 28% at constant exchange rates. The updated expectation reflects the impairment loss reflected to ocedurenone communicated in June of negative 6 percentage point.

pairs.en: Excluding this impact, we now expect a positive 4-percentage-point increase on operating profit growth expectations for the full year. This is driven by the updated increased sales outlook compared to previous expectations. Capital expenditure is still expected to be around 45 billion Danish kroner in 2024, reflecting expansion of the global supply chain. Free cash flow is now expected to be between 59 billion and 69 billion Danish kroner, reflecting the sales growth, a favorable impact from rebates in U.S., countered by investments in capital expenditure.
pairs.zh:
排除这一影响，我们现在预计全年营业利润增长预期将正向增加4个百分点。这得益于相较于此前预期，最新上调的销售前景。资本支出预计仍将在2024年达到约450亿丹麦克朗，反映了全球供应链的扩张。自由现金流现在预计在590亿至690亿丹麦克朗之间，反映出销售增长以及美国返利带来的有利影响，但被资本支出投资所抵消。

Excluding this impact, we now expect a positive 4-percentage-point increase on operating profit growth expectations for the full year. This is driven by the updated increased sales outlook compared to previous expectations. Capital expenditure is still expected to be around 45 billion Danish kroner in 2024, reflecting expansion of the global supply chain. Free cash flow is now expected to be between 59 billion and 69 billion Danish kroner, reflecting the sales growth, a favorable impact from rebates in U.S., countered by investments in capital expenditure.

pairs.en: The updated cash flow expectation mainly reflects the increased sales growth outlook. Income under the 340B program has been partially recognized, one ruling from the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit remains pending and along with the D.C. circuit ruling may be subject to further discretionary appellate review before the US Supreme Court.
pairs.zh:
更新后的现金流预期主要反映了销售增长前景的提升。340B计划下的收入已部分确认，美国第七巡回上诉法院的一项裁决尚未作出，该裁决连同哥伦比亚特区巡回上诉法院的裁决，可能还需在美国最高法院接受进一步酌情上诉审查。

The updated cash flow expectation mainly reflects the increased sales growth outlook. Income under the 340B program has been partially recognized, one ruling from the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit remains pending and along with the D.C. circuit ruling may be subject to further discretionary appellate review before the US Supreme Court.

pairs.en: Depending on the outcome of any subsequent rulings and appeals in these matters, there may be a material impact on Novo Nordisk's financial position, net sales, and cash flow. Financial impacts related to and following the expected closing of the Catalent transaction have not been included in the financial guidance. That covers the outlook for 2024. Now, back to you, Lars.
pairs.zh:
根据这些事项后续裁决和上诉的结果，可能会对诺和诺德的财务状况、净销售额和现金流产生重大影响。与Catalent交易预期完成相关及之后的财务影响未纳入财务指引中。该指引涵盖2024年的展望。现在，交回给Lars。

Depending on the outcome of any subsequent rulings and appeals in these matters, there may be a material impact on Novo Nordisk's financial position, net sales, and cash flow. Financial impacts related to and following the expected closing of the Catalent transaction have not been included in the financial guidance. That covers the outlook for 2024. Now, back to you, Lars.

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen——总裁兼首席执行官

Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Karsten. Please turn to the final slide. We are very pleased with the sales growth in the first six months of 2024. The growth is driven by increasing demand for our GLP-1-based diabetes and obesity treatments, and we're serving more patients than ever before.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Karsten。请翻到最后一页。我们对2024年上半年的销售增长感到非常满意。这一增长得益于市场对我们基于GLP-1的糖尿病和肥胖症治疗药物需求的不断上升，我们正在为比以往更多的患者提供服务。

Thank you, Karsten. Please turn to the final slide. We are very pleased with the sales growth in the first six months of 2024. The growth is driven by increasing demand for our GLP-1-based diabetes and obesity treatments, and we're serving more patients than ever before.

pairs.en: Within R&D, we are very pleased with the first Phase 3 trial results with Mim8 and its potential for people living with hemophilia, as well as the recommendation for label extension for cardiovascular risk reduction for Wegovy in the EU. With that, I'd like to hand over the word to Jacob.
pairs.zh:
在研发方面，我们对Mim8的首个三期试验结果及其对血友病患者的潜力，以及Wegovy在欧盟获推荐扩展标签用于降低心血管风险感到非常满意。接下来，我想把发言权交给Jacob。

Within R&D, we are very pleased with the first Phase 3 trial results with Mim8 and its potential for people living with hemophilia, as well as the recommendation for label extension for cardiovascular risk reduction for Wegovy in the EU. With that, I'd like to hand over the word to Jacob.

pairs.en: Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations
pairs.zh:
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you, Lars. Next slide, please. With that, we're now ready for the Q&A. We are kindly asking all participants to limit her or himself to one or maximum two questions, including sub-questions.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Lars。请翻到下一张幻灯片。至此，我们已准备好进入问答环节。我们恳请各位参与者将问题限制在一个，最多两个（含子问题）。

Thank you, Lars. Next slide, please. With that, we're now ready for the Q&A. We are kindly asking all participants to limit her or himself to one or maximum two questions, including sub-questions.

pairs.zh:
接线员，我们现在准备接受第一个问题。
Operator, we are now ready to take the first question.

pairs.zh:
问题与解答：
Questions & Answers:

pairs.zh:
操作员

pairs.en: Thank you. [Operator instructions] We will now take your first question. And your first question comes from the line of Emily Field from Barclays. Please go ahead.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。[Operator instructions] 现在开始第一个问题。您的第一个问题来自Barclays的Emily Field。请提问。

Thank you. [Operator instructions] We will now take your first question. And your first question comes from the line of Emily Field from Barclays. Please go ahead.

pairs.en: Emily Field--Barclays -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Emily Field--Barclays--分析师

Emily Field--Barclays -- Analyst

pairs.en: Hi. Thanks for taking my questions. One on Wegovy pricing and one on Wegovy supply. The first question on pricing.
pairs.zh:
你好。感谢你回答我的问题。一个问题关于Wegovy定价，另一个关于Wegovy供应。第一个问题关于定价。

Hi. Thanks for taking my questions. One on Wegovy pricing and one on Wegovy supply. The first question on pricing.

pairs.en: In terms of the gross to net and the U.S. widening from 1Q to 2Q, can you help us understand the moving parts here? Is there a component of seasonality? How much due to competition or how much due to channel mix, as you talked about, more penetrating into the Medicaid channel, and you can now sell to the select population in Medicare. And then secondly, on supply. It's great to see the 0.5 and 1 mg doses of Wegovy coming off the FDA drug shortage list, although it does seem like you're voluntarily keeping the 0.25 dosage capped in order to limit new patients.
pairs.zh:
关于总净额以及美国从第一季度到第二季度的扩大情况，您能否帮助我们理解其中的变动因素？是否存在季节性因素？其中有多少是由于竞争，或者如您所谈到的渠道组合变化，比如更深入地渗透到Medicaid渠道，以及现在能够向Medicare中的特定人群销售？其次，关于供应问题。很高兴看到Wegovy的0.5毫克和1毫克剂量已从FDA的药品短缺名单中移除，尽管您似乎自愿将0.25毫克剂量限制供应，以限制新患者数量。

In terms of the gross to net and the U.S. widening from 1Q to 2Q, can you help us understand the moving parts here? Is there a component of seasonality? How much due to competition or how much due to channel mix, as you talked about, more penetrating into the Medicaid channel, and you can now sell to the select population in Medicare. And then secondly, on supply. It's great to see the 0.5 and 1 mg doses of Wegovy coming off the FDA drug shortage list, although it does seem like you're voluntarily keeping the 0.25 dosage capped in order to limit new patients.

pairs.en: Do you expect this cap to continue throughout the rest of the year? Or could it be lifted before the end of 2024? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
您预计这一上限会在今年剩余时间内持续吗？还是在2024年底之前有可能被取消？谢谢。

Do you expect this cap to continue throughout the rest of the year? Or could it be lifted before the end of 2024? Thank you.

pairs.en: Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations
pairs.zh:
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you, Emily, for those questions. For the first question, I'll hand it over to Lars on overall pricing dynamics before turning to Doug on U.S. specific dynamics pricing-wise and also on the supply situation. Lars?
pairs.zh:
感谢Emily提出这些问题。关于第一个问题，我将先交给Lars来谈谈整体定价动态，然后再请Doug介绍美国具体的定价动态以及供应情况。Lars？

Thank you, Emily, for those questions. For the first question, I'll hand it over to Lars on overall pricing dynamics before turning to Doug on U.S. specific dynamics pricing-wise and also on the supply situation. Lars?

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen——总裁兼首席执行官

Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. Thank you. Emily, thank you. So, I would say, overall, the current market structure is one where we really compete and secure success based on ability to supply.
pairs.zh:
是的。谢谢。Emily，谢谢。所以，我想说，总体而言，当前的市场结构是，我们真正根据供应能力来竞争并确保成功。

Yeah. Thank you. Emily, thank you. So, I would say, overall, the current market structure is one where we really compete and secure success based on ability to supply.

pairs.en: So, it's not one where, say, classical commercial tactics is dominating. And you should see, I would say, our commercial strategies in that perspective. You allude to the channel mix, and we also just had in our brief that we are now expanding access in Medicaid. So, we have 20 states adopting Wegovy in Medicaid.
pairs.zh:
所以，这并不是传统的商业策略占据主导地位的情况。我认为你应该从这个角度看待我们的商业策略。你提到了渠道组合，而我们也在简报中提到，我们正在扩展Medicaid渠道的准入。目前已有20个州将Wegovy纳入Medicaid覆盖范围。

So, it's not one where, say, classical commercial tactics is dominating. And you should see, I would say, our commercial strategies in that perspective. You allude to the channel mix, and we also just had in our brief that we are now expanding access in Medicaid. So, we have 20 states adopting Wegovy in Medicaid.

pairs.en: Of course, with that expansion, as we know, from all drug categories, when you move into some of these channels, it comes at a lower, say, net price in these channels, which then has no all impact. But I would say we are encouraged with a stable competitive dynamics. And our focus is really on securing supply to make sure that we can serve as many patients as possible, more than others', say, tougher commercial tactics.
pairs.zh:
当然，正如我们所知，随着这种扩张，从所有药物类别来看，当进入某些渠道时，这些渠道的净价会较低，这对整体没有影响。但我想说，我们对稳定的竞争格局感到鼓舞。我们的重点实际上是确保供应，以便能够服务尽可能多的患者，而不是像其他公司那样采取更激烈的商业策略。

原文：
Of course, with that expansion, as we know, from all drug categories, when you move into some of these channels, it comes at a lower, say, net price in these channels, which then has no all impact. But I would say we are encouraged with a stable competitive dynamics. And our focus is really on securing supply to make sure that we can serve as many patients as possible, more than others', say, tougher commercial tactics.

pairs.en: Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations
pairs.zh:
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you, Lars. And with that, I'll hand over to you, Doug, on the U.S. specifics as well as on the supply situation.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你，Lars。那么接下来，我将把关于美国具体情况以及供应状况的发言权交给你，Doug。

Thank you, Lars. And with that, I'll hand over to you, Doug, on the U.S. specifics as well as on the supply situation.

pairs.en: Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, North America Operations
pairs.zh:
Doug Langa——执行副总裁，北美运营  
Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, North America Operations

pairs.en: Yep. Thanks, Lars, and thanks for the question, Emily. So, overall, I'd start with, we're pleased with the Wegovy performance. Whether you look at the NBRx moving from roughly 5,000 new branded prescriptions at the beginning of the year to 35 currently or the TRx, which moved from 100,000 beginning of the year to roughly 200,000 or doubling.
pairs.zh:
是的。谢谢，Lars，也谢谢你的问题，Emily。总体而言，我想先说，我们对Wegovy的表现感到满意。无论你是看NBRx从年初大约5,000个新品牌处方增加到目前的35个，还是看TRx从年初10万增加到大约20万，即翻了一番。

Yep. Thanks, Lars, and thanks for the question, Emily. So, overall, I'd start with, we're pleased with the Wegovy performance. Whether you look at the NBRx moving from roughly 5,000 new branded prescriptions at the beginning of the year to 35 currently or the TRx, which moved from 100,000 beginning of the year to roughly 200,000 or doubling.

pairs.en: We're pleased with that. We're serving more patients than ever before as Lars mentioned earlier. And market access continues to be robust. As I had mentioned, there's over 50 million people with obesity and importantly, around 10 million vulnerable patients that have access via Medicaid in around 20 states.
pairs.zh:
我们对此感到满意。正如Lars之前提到的，我们服务的患者比以往任何时候都多。市场准入依然强劲。正如我之前所说，有超过5000万肥胖人群，重要的是，在大约20个州，约有1000万弱势患者通过Medicaid获得医疗机会。

We're pleased with that. We're serving more patients than ever before as Lars mentioned earlier. And market access continues to be robust. As I had mentioned, there's over 50 million people with obesity and importantly, around 10 million vulnerable patients that have access via Medicaid in around 20 states.

pairs.en: So, that's robust, and we're pleased with that. And in doing that, we're seeing that almost or above 80% of the patients are paying $25 or less. And that is our ambition. Our goal is to grow market access.
pairs.zh:
因此，这很稳健，我们对此感到满意。通过这样做，我们看到几乎80%或以上的患者支付25美元或更少。这正是我们的目标。我们的目的是扩大市场准入。

So, that's robust, and we're pleased with that. And in doing that, we're seeing that almost or above 80% of the patients are paying $25 or less. And that is our ambition. Our goal is to grow market access.

pairs.en: And it's fair to assume as volume goes up, prices will come down, and we have seen lower Wegovy prices in the first half. I don't want to get into specifics there, but it is in line with expectations. Our focus remains in building even stronger access for AOM treatments across all channels. And again, I'd say that we are pleased with the overall performance, and we're serving more patients than ever before.
pairs.zh:
可以合理假设，随着使用量增加，价格会下降，我们在上半年已经看到Wegovy价格有所降低。我不想谈论具体细节，但这符合预期。我们的重点仍然是为AOM treatments在所有渠道建立更强大的可及性。再次强调，我对整体表现感到满意，我们服务的患者比以往任何时候都多。

原文：And it's fair to assume as volume goes up, prices will come down, and we have seen lower Wegovy prices in the first half. I don't want to get into specifics there, but it is in line with expectations. Our focus remains in building even stronger access for AOM treatments across all channels. And again, I'd say that we are pleased with the overall performance, and we're serving more patients than ever before.

Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you so much, Doug. And finally, also on the lower dose strength of Wegovy, any update there?
pairs.zh:
非常感谢你，Doug。最后，关于Wegovy的低剂量强度，有什么更新吗？

Thank you so much, Doug. And finally, also on the lower dose strength of Wegovy, any update there?

pairs.en: Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, North America Operations
pairs.zh:
Doug Langa——执行副总裁，北美运营  
Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, North America Operations

pairs.en: Yeah. And so, we don't believe that the 0.25 -- that was a choice we made. Again, as we've said consistently, quarter after quarter, continuity of care is incredibly important to us and maybe what separates us. We think it's really important that patients are able to titrate through the appropriate doses.
pairs.zh:
是的。因此，我们不认为0.25——那是我们做出的选择。再次强调，正如我们一直所说的，一个季度又一个季度，护理的连续性对我们来说极其重要，或许这也是我们的与众不同之处。我们认为，患者能够通过适当剂量进行剂量调整是非常关键的。

原文：Yeah. And so, we don't believe that the 0.25 -- that was a choice we made. Again, as we've said consistently, quarter after quarter, continuity of care is incredibly important to us and maybe what separates us. We think it's really important that patients are able to titrate through the appropriate doses.

pairs.en: So, we'll continue to dynamically manage that, but we're also confident in the levels that we see with all the other dose strengths. So, you shouldn't anticipate that 0.25 changing throughout this year to the [Inaudible].
pairs.zh:
因此，我们将继续动态管理这一点，同时我们对其他所有剂量强度所见到的水平也充满信心。因此，你不应预期0.25这一数字在今年内会发生[听不清]的变化。

原文：So, we'll continue to dynamically manage that, but we're also confident in the levels that we see with all the other dose strengths. So, you shouldn't anticipate that 0.25 changing throughout this year to the [Inaudible].

pairs.en: Hi. Thanks for taking my questions here. So, first one I have was just on Monlunabant. I wanted to see what type of efficacy and safety you expect to see or want to see to move forward with this product? And then second question was just on ESSENCE.
pairs.zh:
你好。感谢你在这里回答我的问题。我的第一个问题是关于Monlunabant的。我想了解你们期望或希望看到什么样的疗效和安全性数据，才会推进这个产品？第二个问题是关于ESSENCE的。

Hi. Thanks for taking my questions here. So, first one I have was just on Monlunabant. I wanted to see what type of efficacy and safety you expect to see or want to see to move forward with this product? And then second question was just on ESSENCE.

pairs.en: Out of the 1,200 patients enrolled in the Phase 3 study, how many patients are expected to be part of the F2-F3 biopsy beta? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
在Phase 3研究入组的1,200名患者中，预计有多少患者属于F2-F3 biopsy beta组？谢谢。

Out of the 1,200 patients enrolled in the Phase 3 study, how many patients are expected to be part of the F2-F3 biopsy beta? Thank you.

pairs.zh:
谢谢Louise提出的这两个问题。那么接下来我想请Martin首先谈谈关于Monlunabant的预期，以及ESSENCE试验中入组的患者情况。

Thank you, Louise, for those two questions. I'll hand over then to you, Martin, first on Monlunabant expectations as well as on patients enrolled in ESSENCE.

pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Yes, absolutely. So, we continue to be excited about the potential for Monlunabant. We don't have a lot of news yet. We expect the readout from the dedicated obesity trial in Q3 of this year and from the diabetes kidney disease trial at the end of this year.
pairs.zh:
是的，当然。因此，我们仍然对Monlunabant的潜力感到兴奋。我们目前还没有太多消息。我们预计今年第三季度将公布专门的肥胖症试验的结果，以及今年年底将公布糖尿病肾病试验的结果。

Yes, absolutely. So, we continue to be excited about the potential for Monlunabant. We don't have a lot of news yet. We expect the readout from the dedicated obesity trial in Q3 of this year and from the diabetes kidney disease trial at the end of this year.

pairs.en: Based on our modeling, we expect around a 15% weight loss. And obviously, our focus is on demonstrating that together with an attractive safety profile. But we don't have a lot of news at this point. We have to wait a couple of months before that.
pairs.zh:
根据我们的模型，预计可实现约15%的体重减轻。显然，我们的重点在于展现这一效果的同时保持令人满意的安全性。但目前我们没有太多新消息，还需要等待几个月。

原文：
Based on our modeling, we expect around a 15% weight loss. And obviously, our focus is on demonstrating that together with an attractive safety profile. But we don't have a lot of news at this point. We have to wait a couple of months before that.

pairs.en: On the ESSENCE trial, you'll probably recall, we sort of have a two-tier trials. The first proportion of the trial includes 800 patients, which will serve as the regulatory submission. We will see the readout of those 800 patients this year. They will all have liver biopsies, and they will be in the F2-F3 category.
pairs.zh:
关于ESSENCE试验，你可能还记得，我们有点像有两层试验。试验的第一部分包括800名患者，将作为监管提交的依据。我们将在今年看到这800名患者的结果。他们都将进行肝脏活检，并且属于F2-F3类别。

On the ESSENCE trial, you'll probably recall, we sort of have a two-tier trials. The first proportion of the trial includes 800 patients, which will serve as the regulatory submission. We will see the readout of those 800 patients this year. They will all have liver biopsies, and they will be in the F2-F3 category.

pairs.en: We then go to the full 1,200 patients for a hard outcomes proportion of the trial. It will basically also be patients who have liver biopsies and be in the F2-F3 categories. But first step is to see the regulatory readout, which we will receive at the end -- toward the end of the year.
pairs.zh:
然后我们将对全部1,200名患者进行试验的硬终点比例分析。这些患者基本上也都将接受肝活检且属于F2-F3类别。但第一步是查看监管结果，我们将在年底——接近年底时收到。

We then go to the full 1,200 patients for a hard outcomes proportion of the trial. It will basically also be patients who have liver biopsies and be in the F2-F3 categories. But first step is to see the regulatory readout, which we will receive at the end -- toward the end of the year.

pairs.en: Evan Seigerman--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Evan Seigerman——分析师  
Evan Seigerman--Analyst

pairs.en: Hi, guys. Thank you so much for taking my questions and for all of the color on the call today. One for -- a few for me. Just on the Catalent transaction, maybe just walk us through kind of the update there.
pairs.zh:
大家好。非常感谢你们回答我的问题，也感谢今天电话会议上提供的所有细节。我有一个——其实有几个问题。关于Catalent的交易，或许带我们了解一下最新进展。

Hi, guys. Thank you so much for taking my questions and for all of the color on the call today. One for -- a few for me. Just on the Catalent transaction, maybe just walk us through kind of the update there.

pairs.en: And more specifically, as you think about building out capacity, what are the levers can you pull to kind of get your supply of incretins up to meet demand? I know that was a key theme on the call today. And then maybe you can kind of walk us through some of the expectations for the CB1 inverse agonist data that's coming later than the third quarter. Thank you so much.
pairs.zh:
更具体地说，当你考虑扩大产能时，你们可以动用哪些杠杆来增加肠促胰岛素的供应以满足需求？我知道这是今天电话会议上的一个关键主题。此外，你能否为我们介绍一下对CB1反向激动剂数据的一些预期？这些数据将在第三季度后公布。非常感谢。

原文：
And more specifically, as you think about building out capacity, what are the levers can you pull to kind of get your supply of incretins up to meet demand? I know that was a key theme on the call today. And then maybe you can kind of walk us through some of the expectations for the CB1 inverse agonist data that's coming later than the third quarter. Thank you so much.

pairs.en: Thank you, Evan, for those two questions. Firstly, to Karsten on Catalent and overall supply chain strategy.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你，Evan，提出的这两个问题。首先，回答Karsten关于Catalent和整体供应链策略的问题。

Thank you, Evan, for those two questions. Firstly, to Karsten on Catalent and overall supply chain strategy.

pairs.en: Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Karsten Munk Knudsen——执行副总裁、首席财务官

Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. Thanks, Evan, for this question and good to connect. So, on Catalent, it is still our expectation that the transaction closes toward the end of 2024. We're in active dialogue with the different regulators in terms of antitrust reviews.
pairs.zh:
是的。谢谢你，Evan，提出这个问题，很高兴能联系上。关于Catalent，我们仍预期交易将在2024年底前完成。我们正在与不同的监管机构就反垄断审查进行积极对话。

Yeah. Thanks, Evan, for this question and good to connect. So, on Catalent, it is still our expectation that the transaction closes toward the end of 2024. We're in active dialogue with the different regulators in terms of antitrust reviews.

pairs.en: So -- but reiterate closing toward the end of the year. And with Catalent, we're significantly expanding our fill-finish network with the three additional sites on top of the sites we already have up and running and, by the way, also expanding. So, our overall supply chain strategy is really one of scaling our API facilities in Kalundborg on the peptide side and in Hillerod Denmark on the antibodies side linked to our pipeline progression and then scaling our Finnish sites on a global scale to be able to accommodate significantly many more patients than we've been able to do so historically. And that ties into our overall corporate strategy of being able to reach many, many more patients than we've ever done before linked to the unmet need in the cardiometabolic space.
pairs.zh:
所以——但重申年底前完成收购。通过Catalent，我们正在显著扩大灌装封装网络，在现有已投产且持续扩建的基地基础上，再增加三个新站点。因此，我们的整体供应链战略实际上就是：在Kalundborg的肽类原料药设施与Hillerod丹麦的抗体设施方面同步推进管线扩张，并在全球范围内扩大芬兰生产基地的规模，以便能服务比历史上多得多的患者。这与公司整体战略一脉相承——通过覆盖心血管代谢领域未满足的需求，触达远超以往的患者群体。

So -- but reiterate closing toward the end of the year. And with Catalent, we're significantly expanding our fill-finish network with the three additional sites on top of the sites we already have up and running and, by the way, also expanding. So, our overall supply chain strategy is really one of scaling our API facilities in Kalundborg on the peptide side and in Hillerod Denmark on the antibodies side linked to our pipeline progression and then scaling our Finnish sites on a global scale to be able to accommodate significantly many more patients than we've been able to do so historically. And that ties into our overall corporate strategy of being able to reach many, many more patients than we've ever done before linked to the unmet need in the cardiometabolic space.

Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you, Karsten. Secondly, on Monlunabant expectations again for Martin.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Karsten。其次，再次针对Monlunabant的预期向Martin提问。
Thank you, Karsten. Secondly, on Monlunabant expectations again for Martin.

pairs.en: Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development
pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Yeah. So, again, not a lot of news. We're expecting two data readouts, one from obesity, one for diabetes later this year. That will be exciting.
pairs.zh:
是的。所以，再次强调，没有太多新闻。我们预计今年晚些时候会有两项数据读出，一项来自肥胖症，一项来自糖尿病。那将很令人兴奋。

Yeah. So, again, not a lot of news. We're expecting two data readouts, one from obesity, one for diabetes later this year. That will be exciting.

pairs.en: Our focus will obviously be on the efficacy in terms of the weight loss. Our current modeling is suggesting at least a 15% weight loss. That will be an attractive oral monotherapy in and of itself, but also with the potential of being combined with semaglutide. But these are early days, these are model data, and we'll see the stronger readouts in Q3 and Q4 of this year.
pairs.zh:
我们的重点显然将放在体重减轻的疗效上。目前的模型显示至少能减重15%。这本身将是一种有吸引力的口服单药疗法，同时也有潜力与semaglutide联合使用。不过目前仍处于早期阶段，这些只是模型数据，我们将在今年Q3和Q4看到更强劲的读出结果。

Our focus will obviously be on the efficacy in terms of the weight loss. Our current modeling is suggesting at least a 15% weight loss. That will be an attractive oral monotherapy in and of itself, but also with the potential of being combined with semaglutide. But these are early days, these are model data, and we'll see the stronger readouts in Q3 and Q4 of this year.

pairs.en: Sachin Jain--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Sachin Jain--分析师

Sachin Jain--Analyst

pairs.en: Hi there. Thanks for taking my questions. Two, please. Firstly, a big-picture one for Karsten just on guidance.
pairs.zh:
你好。感谢你回答我的问题。两个问题。首先，一个宏观的问题问Karsten，关于指引。

原文：Hi there. Thanks for taking my questions. Two, please. Firstly, a big-picture one for Karsten just on guidance.

pairs.en: Midpoint, I believe, implies underlying acceleration in 2H relative to the underlying growth in the first half. Given there's a lot of moving parts, I wonder if you could just talk through some of the key drivers, pushes and pulls, particularly around Wegovy and Ozempic. And then the second question is to try and get a bit more color, Doug, Karsten, Lars, on the Wegovy price around the commentary as volumes go up, price comes down. If you would give us some sense of magnitude of price pressure short and midterm.
pairs.zh:
我认为，中点意味着下半年相对于上半年的潜在增长有所加速。鉴于存在许多变数，我想知道您能否谈谈一些关键驱动因素、推动力和阻力，特别是围绕Wegovy和Ozempic的情况。第二个问题是，希望Doug、Karsten、Lars能进一步说明Wegovy的价格情况，根据相关评论提到销量上升时价格下降。能否简要说明短期和中期的价格压力程度。

Midpoint, I believe, implies underlying acceleration in 2H relative to the underlying growth in the first half. Given there's a lot of moving parts, I wonder if you could just talk through some of the key drivers, pushes and pulls, particularly around Wegovy and Ozempic. And then the second question is to try and get a bit more color, Doug, Karsten, Lars, on the Wegovy price around the commentary as volumes go up, price comes down. If you would give us some sense of magnitude of price pressure short and midterm.

pairs.en: So, I'm going to frame the question like this. You've loosely commented to around 10% price pressure per year for Ozempic. Should we think about Wegovy as more or less than that? And can you give any specific color on 2H trends relative to 1H? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
那么，我这样来提问：您曾大致提到Ozempic每年面临约10%的价格压力。那么Wegovy的价格压力是高于还是低于这个数字？另外，能否具体说明下半年相对于上半年的趋势？谢谢。

So, I'm going to frame the question like this. You've loosely commented to around 10% price pressure per year for Ozempic. Should we think about Wegovy as more or less than that? And can you give any specific color on 2H trends relative to 1H? Thank you.

pairs.zh:
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.zh:
谢谢你，Sachin。关于第一个指导框架模块，我会交给你，Karsten。

Thank you, Sachin. For the first one on guidance building blocks, I'll hand that to you, Karsten.
