pairs.zh:
Karsten Munk Knudsen——执行副总裁、首席财务官

Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. Thank you for that question, Sachin. And as noted in our release, then we are upgrading our top-line guidance by a couple of points and narrowing the guidance range also. So, really supporting the fact that we are off to a really strong start in this year and see strong trends, both commercially as well as supply chain-wise.
pairs.zh:
是的。感谢你的提问，Sachin。正如我们在公告中所指出的，我们将上调营收指引几个百分点，同时收窄指引范围。这确实印证了我们今年开局非常强劲，并且在商业和供应链方面都看到了积极的趋势。

原文：
Yeah. Thank you for that question, Sachin. And as noted in our release, then we are upgrading our top-line guidance by a couple of points and narrowing the guidance range also. So, really supporting the fact that we are off to a really strong start in this year and see strong trends, both commercially as well as supply chain-wise.

pairs.en: So, that's the backdrop for our increasing guidance. And then to the second-half acceleration part of your question. Yes, that is correct. And you could see the 25% growth we have in the first half of this year benefits from the rebate adjustments we've been talking to related to the U.S., both in the first quarter and in the second quarter, as well as to an easier comparator linked to the phasing of rebates in 2023.
pairs.zh:
这就是我们提高业绩指引的背景。至于你问题中关于下半年增长加速的部分，没错，确实如此。你可以看到，我们今年上半年实现25%的增长，得益于我们一直在讨论的与美国相关的返利调整，这涉及第一季度和第二季度，同时也得益于2023年返利分阶段实施带来的较低比较基数。

So, that's the backdrop for our increasing guidance. And then to the second-half acceleration part of your question. Yes, that is correct. And you could see the 25% growth we have in the first half of this year benefits from the rebate adjustments we've been talking to related to the U.S., both in the first quarter and in the second quarter, as well as to an easier comparator linked to the phasing of rebates in 2023.

pairs.en: So, we delivered 25% with both a tailwind and an easy comparator. And then delivering that for the full year clearly entails an acceleration into the second half in terms of growth, despite the fact that the comparator is tougher linked to the rebate phasing of last year. And that acceleration is really a function of continued trends of what you're seeing already in the marketplace today in terms of the Wegovy penetration in the U.S., where we doubled the number of scripts from the beginning of the year until now, weekly scripts, also an acceleration in terms of Wegovy sales in international operations and the continuation of Ozempic performance into the second half. So, underlying clear acceleration during the second half compared to the first half.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们实现了25%的增长，这得益于顺风因素和较低的同比基数。而要实现全年这一增长，显然需要在下半年加速增长，尽管由于去年返利节奏的调整，同比基数变得更为严峻。这种加速实际上反映了市场现有趋势的延续：Wegovy在美国市场渗透率持续提升——从年初至今，周处方量翻了一番；Wegovy在国际业务中的销售额也在加速增长；以及Ozempic在下半年延续强劲表现。因此，下半年较上半年存在明确的加速势头。

原文：
So, we delivered 25% with both a tailwind and an easy comparator. And then delivering that for the full year clearly entails an acceleration into the second half in terms of growth, despite the fact that the comparator is tougher linked to the rebate phasing of last year. And that acceleration is really a function of continued trends of what you're seeing already in the marketplace today in terms of the Wegovy penetration in the U.S., where we doubled the number of scripts from the beginning of the year until now, weekly scripts, also an acceleration in terms of Wegovy sales in international operations and the continuation of Ozempic performance into the second half. So, underlying clear acceleration during the second half compared to the first half.

Thank you, Karsten. And secondly on overall pricing dynamics, Lars.

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen——总裁兼首席执行官

Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Yes. So, thanks, Sachin. So, we prefer not to get into a very detailed comments on pricing because that turns into a quarter-over-quarter storyline then. So -- but I would like to say, underlying what I mentioned in my opening that -- and also as Karsten just alluded to, this is a marketplace where we compete on bringing, say, volumes to the market.
pairs.zh:
是的。所以，谢谢，Sachin。我们倾向于不对定价进行非常详细的评论，因为那会变成逐季度的故事线。但是我想说，在我开场白中提到的基础上——而且正如Karsten刚才提到的，这是一个我们通过为市场带来（比如说）交易量来进行竞争的市场。

Yes. So, thanks, Sachin. So, we prefer not to get into a very detailed comments on pricing because that turns into a quarter-over-quarter storyline then. So -- but I would like to say, underlying what I mentioned in my opening that -- and also as Karsten just alluded to, this is a marketplace where we compete on bringing, say, volumes to the market.

pairs.en: So, it's not one where we feel that we are into, say, price competition having said that there are different segments of the market. And we feel that it's relevant to also be present in the segments where we had the most vulnerable patients. And they are typically served by Medicaid. So, we have now, as we mentioned, 20 states having adopted to Wegovy.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们并不认为自己陷入了所谓的价格竞争，尽管市场确实存在不同的细分领域。我们认为，在那些最弱势患者群体所在的细分市场保持存在也很重要，而这些患者通常由Medicaid提供服务。因此，正如我们所述，目前已有20个州采用了Wegovy。

原文：
So, it's not one where we feel that we are into, say, price competition having said that there are different segments of the market. And we feel that it's relevant to also be present in the segments where we had the most vulnerable patients. And they are typically served by Medicaid. So, we have now, as we mentioned, 20 states having adopted to Wegovy.

pairs.en: And we all know that for any product, when you go into Medicaid, it comes at somewhat lower price point, so that should be factored in. So, it's a stable competitive setting. And it's really for us about scaling the volumes to deliver on the demand -- sorry, on the access we have delivered. And we can see the demand is there.
pairs.zh:
我们都知道，任何产品一旦进入Medicaid，其价格点都会相对较低，因此需要将这个因素考虑进去。所以，这是一个稳定的竞争环境。对我们来说，关键在于扩大产量以满足需求——不好意思，是满足我们已经实现的准入。而我们可以看到，需求是存在的。

原文：And we all know that for any product, when you go into Medicaid, it comes at somewhat lower price point, so that should be factored in. So, it's a stable competitive setting. And it's really for us about scaling the volumes to deliver on the demand -- sorry, on the access we have delivered. And we can see the demand is there.

pairs.en: So, it's about scaling to meet the demand, I would say, more than any other tactics, so to say. And as Karsten just mentioned, we have the capacity to scale and accelerate, serving many more patients in the second half. I think that's -- I think the encouraging part of our release here that we upgrade to do that against a somewhat tougher comparator in the second half of the year. So, I think there's a sign of strong momentum and also execution from a supply chain point of view.
pairs.zh:
所以，这主要是关于扩大规模以满足需求，我想说，比其他任何策略都更重要。就像Karsten刚才提到的，我们有能力扩大规模并加速，在下半年服务更多患者。我认为——我认为我们此次发布中令人鼓舞的部分是，我们升级了目标，以应对下半年相对更艰难的对比基数。因此，我认为这显示出强劲的势头，同时也体现了供应链方面的执行力。

原文：So, it's about scaling to meet the demand, I would say, more than any other tactics, so to say. And as Karsten just mentioned, we have the capacity to scale and accelerate, serving many more patients in the second half. I think that's -- I think the encouraging part of our release here that we upgrade to do that against a somewhat tougher comparator in the second half of the year. So, I think there's a sign of strong momentum and also execution from a supply chain point of view.

pairs.en: Thank you.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。
Thank you.

那么，我可以提供一个数据点。我们在20个州拥有Medicaid覆盖。至于下半年Medicaid和商业保险之间的业务量会如何分布，当然存在很大的不确定性。但实际上，我们在20个州拥有非常强大的Medicaid渠道，覆盖了约1000万肥胖人群。

原文：So, if I can give one data point. So, we have Medicaid coverage into the tune of 20 states. How exactly the volumes are going to fall out in the second half between Medicaid and commercial, of course, is very speculative. But we have actually a very strong Medicaid-based access of 20 states and around 10 million people with obesity covered that way around.

pairs.en: You know, based on the new patient, I know you've said that your 35,000 scripts a week, you'll limit those starter doses. But based on the new patients you've already accrued and that level of patients and your knowledge of the pull-through of patients to higher doses, how do you see the TRx developing? 我认为您提到这在下半年可能会改善。但您预计供应何时能解决，以便我们期待下半年实现强劲增长？我们何时能期待Ozempic在IO领域恢复强劲增长？非常感谢。

I think you alluded to that that could improve in the second half. But just when can you anticipate supply resolved there so that we can expect strong growth in the second half? When can we expect strong growth for Ozempic to resume in IO? Thanks very much.

Yep. Thank you, Richard. And let me just clarify. We're not precisely limiting to 35.

pairs.en: We're dynamically managing that because, again, critically important to us is patient continuity of care. So, that is the starting dose, as you know. And so, that's the one we will manage. It's not to limit, and so you may see fluctuations in that.
pairs.zh:
我们正在动态管理这一点，因为再次强调，对我们来说至关重要是患者的护理连续性。所以，如你所知，那是起始剂量。因此，我们将管理这一点。这不是为了限制，所以你可能会看到波动。

We're dynamically managing that because, again, critically important to us is patient continuity of care. So, that is the starting dose, as you know. And so, that's the one we will manage. It's not to limit, and so you may see fluctuations in that.

pairs.en: What I would anticipate is a steady, consistent TRx trend. I don't want to get into where that may go or where that may cross Ozempic. Again, we're pleased with the performance. As Karsten and both Lars alluded to, we've more than doubled that from the beginning of the year to currently.
pairs.zh:
我预计会是一个稳定、持续的TRx趋势。我不想深入探讨它可能走向何方，或者何时会超越Ozempic。再次强调，我们对业绩感到满意。正如Karsten和Lars两位提到的，从年初至今，我们已经将这一数字翻了一番以上。

What I would anticipate is a steady, consistent TRx trend. I don't want to get into where that may go or where that may cross Ozempic. Again, we're pleased with the performance. As Karsten and both Lars alluded to, we've more than doubled that from the beginning of the year to currently.

pairs.en: We're seeing strong NBRx, and we're serving more patients. So, I don't want to get into predictions of when they'll cross.
pairs.zh:
我们看到强劲的NBRx，并且我们正在为更多患者提供服务。所以，我不想预测它们何时会交叉。

We're seeing strong NBRx, and we're serving more patients. So, I don't want to get into predictions of when they'll cross.

pairs.en: So, actually contributing as much as Ozempic in international operations. And then looking at IO between the first half and second half, then clearly, our ambition and what's implied in guidance is an acceleration from the 11% we delivered in the first half. And that acceleration will come from the Sema franchise. But as you see, we have now launched in 12 markets with Wegovy in international operations.

So, actually contributing as much as Ozempic in international operations. And then looking at IO between the first half and second half, then clearly, our ambition and what's implied in guidance is an acceleration from the 11% we delivered in the first half. And that acceleration will come from the Sema franchise. But as you see, we have now launched in 12 markets with Wegovy in international operations.

pairs.en: So, clearly, you should also expect to see some pickup there, driving higher growth in the second half in IO.
pairs.zh:
所以，很明显，你也应该预计在那里会看到一些回升，推动IO在下半年实现更高增长。

So, clearly, you should also expect to see some pickup there, driving higher growth in the second half in IO.

So, can I just check in with you whether that is still the case? Or have you any updated thoughts there? Thank you.

Yep. Thanks, Pete, for the questions. So, in the U.S., we're still seeing around six months, and that's given the pure supply constraints. And we have to work through that.

pairs.en: But I would tell you this. We are confident that over time, the stay time will improve more toward 12 months and beyond, which would reflect the clinical profile of the product and what we saw in some of the clinical trials. So, still around six months, we're working through that. More to come as we see more stability in supply over time.
pairs.zh:
但我要告诉你的是，我们相信随着时间的推移，留置时间将逐渐改善至接近12个月甚至更久，这将反映该产品的临床特征以及我们在一些临床试验中观察到的结果。所以，目前仍在6个月左右，我们正在努力解决这一问题。随着未来供应更加稳定，还会有更多进展。

But I would tell you this. We are confident that over time, the stay time will improve more toward 12 months and beyond, which would reflect the clinical profile of the product and what we saw in some of the clinical trials. So, still around six months, we're working through that. More to come as we see more stability in supply over time.

Yeah. Thanks, Pete, for that comment. And first of all, I'd just like to refer also to our company announcement and the update on 340B that we included on the legal matters there. pairs.en: Circuit ruling which ruled similarly to the ruling we had in our case. So, all supporting our case, but we still have one key ruling outstanding in the Seventh Circuit. And then as to our accounting, I don't remember us discussing it being conservative. I remember I was discussing it being prudent and aligned to the accounting standards of revenue recognition, where revenue recognition has to be highly probable in order to prove it as revenue.
pairs.zh:
巡回法院的裁决与我们案件中的裁决类似。所以，所有裁决都支持我们的案子，但Seventh Circuit仍有一项关键裁决悬而未决。至于我们的会计处理，我不记得我们讨论过它是否保守。我记得我当时讨论的是它是否审慎，并且符合收入确认的会计准则，即收入确认必须具有很高的可能性才能确认为收入。

原文：Circuit ruling which ruled similarly to the ruling we had in our case. So, all supporting our case, but we still have one key ruling outstanding in the Seventh Circuit. And then as to our accounting, I don't remember us discussing it being conservative. I remember I was discussing it being prudent and aligned to the accounting standards of revenue recognition, where revenue recognition has to be highly probable in order to prove it as revenue.

pairs.en: So, that's how we do it. And -- but we also call out that there is a scenario that could have a material impact on our financial position. And that's what we called out in our announcement. And then let's see how the Seventh Circuit rules and what level of appeals we'll be looking at in the coming months.
pairs.zh:
这就是我们的做法。但我们也指出，存在一种可能对我们的财务状况产生重大影响的情景。这就是我们在公告中提到的。然后，让我们看看Seventh Circuit如何裁决，以及未来几个月我们将面临何种级别的上诉。

So, that's how we do it. And -- but we also call out that there is a scenario that could have a material impact on our financial position. And that's what we called out in our announcement. And then let's see how the Seventh Circuit rules and what level of appeals we'll be looking at in the coming months.

pairs.en: It could be any day that could be news, but I don't know anything further as of today.
pairs.zh:
可能是任何一天都可能成为新闻，但截至今天，我不知道更多信息。

It could be any day that could be news, but I don't know anything further as of today.

pairs.en: Great. Thanks for taking my questions. I've got two, please. So, firstly, on obesity portfolio considerations.
pairs.zh:
好的。感谢您回答我的问题。我有两个问题。首先，关于肥胖症药物组合的考虑。

Great. Thanks for taking my questions. I've got two, please. So, firstly, on obesity portfolio considerations.

pairs.en: You got a number of obesity readouts in the second half of the year. But how are you thinking of the relative positioning and weight loss expectation for STEP UP, so the 7.2 milligrams Sema and obviously CagriSema as well. Will it be an either/or approach from a commercial perspective, or will it be purely data dependent? And could Sema 7.2 milligram potentially be more desirable given the known CV benefits from Sema across all the trials we've seen, and we haven't necessarily seen that with Cagri yet. And then second question on oral therapy.
pairs.zh:
今年下半年你们会有多项肥胖症的数据公布。但关于STEP UP试验（即7.2毫克Sema以及显然还有CagriSema）的相对定位和减重预期，你是如何看待的？从商业角度会是二选一的策略，还是完全取决于数据？考虑到在所有已看到的试验中Sema对心血管的已知益处，而Cagri目前尚未观察到这一点，那么7.2毫克Sema是否可能更具优势？第二个问题是关于口服疗法的。

原文：
You got a number of obesity readouts in the second half of the year. But how are you thinking of the relative positioning and weight loss expectation for STEP UP, so the 7.2 milligrams Sema and obviously CagriSema as well. Will it be an either/or approach from a commercial perspective, or will it be purely data dependent? And could Sema 7.2 milligram potentially be more desirable given the known CV benefits from Sema across all the trials we've seen, and we haven't necessarily seen that with Cagri yet. And then second question on oral therapy.

pairs.en: So, obviously, there's been some competitor data, some early competitor data that's been on the market recently. But in terms of your oral offering OASIS 4, how would you characterize the competitiveness of the data you've seen so far for the 25 milligram dose? And how are you thinking about positioning in the market or even a market for fit approach on the launch? And then maybe also related to that. On the oral SNAC technology, can you remind us where you are in terms of the latest generations? And at what point would you able to have a peptide-based oral with the SNAC technology that could be as convenient as a typical small molecule? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
那么，显然最近市场上有一些竞争对手的数据，一些早期的竞品数据。但就你们的口服产品OASIS 4而言，你如何评价目前看到的25毫克剂量的数据竞争力？你们在产品上市时如何考虑市场定位，甚至采用"适应市场"的策略？另外与此相关的是，关于口服SNAC技术，能否提醒我们你们目前处于哪一代？以及要到什么时候才能拥有基于肽的口服SNAC技术，使其像典型的小分子药物一样便捷？谢谢。

So, obviously, there's been some competitor data, some early competitor data that's been on the market recently. But in terms of your oral offering OASIS 4, how would you characterize the competitiveness of the data you've seen so far for the 25 milligram dose? And how are you thinking about positioning in the market or even a market for fit approach on the launch? And then maybe also related to that. On the oral SNAC technology, can you remind us where you are in terms of the latest generations? And at what point would you able to have a peptide-based oral with the SNAC technology that could be as convenient as a typical small molecule? Thank you.

pairs.en: Yeah. Thanks a lot. First of all, I'd just like to say that we are very encouraged about the progression of our pipeline in obesity. And of course, we look forward to the readouts that we are having in the second half of this year.

是的，非常感谢。首先我想说，我们对肥胖症领域管线的进展感到非常振奋。当然，我们也期待今年下半年即将公布的数据结果。

Yeah. Thanks a lot. First of all, I'd just like to say that we are very encouraged about the progression of our pipeline in obesity. And of course, we look forward to the readouts that we are having in the second half of this year.

pairs.en: It's going to be exciting second half from the number of Phase 3 readouts that we have and both in the oral and also in the injectable space. And I think let's await those readouts. And then later on, of course, when we get closer to launches, we can talk about positioning and how we are going to commercially utilize the strong pipeline that we have.
pairs.zh:
从我们拥有的多个Phase 3读数据来看，下半年将会非常激动人心，无论是在口服还是注射领域。我认为让我们等待这些读数据吧。然后，当然，当我们更接近产品上市时，我们可以讨论定位以及如何将我们强大的pipeline进行商业化利用。

It's going to be exciting second half from the number of Phase 3 readouts that we have and both in the oral and also in the injectable space. And I think let's await those readouts. And then later on, of course, when we get closer to launches, we can talk about positioning and how we are going to commercially utilize the strong pipeline that we have.

Thanks a lot, Camilla. And over to you, Martin, on SNAC.

pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Yeah. So, specifically in the clinical space, we've been testing obviously Generation 1, 2 and 3, as you know. And in the research base, we continue to evolve this. It goes without saying, we'll not take any new generation into the clinic unless we see a potential for a step change in terms of bioavailability.
pairs.zh:
是的。具体在临床领域，我们一直在测试第一代、第二代和第三代产品，这你是知道的。在研究基础上，我们也在持续推进。不言而喻，除非我们看到在生物利用度方面有阶段性突破的潜力，否则我们不会将任何新一代产品引入临床。

原文：
Yeah. So, specifically in the clinical space, we've been testing obviously Generation 1, 2 and 3, as you know. And in the research base, we continue to evolve this. It goes without saying, we'll not take any new generation into the clinic unless we see a potential for a step change in terms of bioavailability.

pairs.en: And this is an ongoing journey and an ongoing effort for us. With respect to the sort of dosing restrictions, we actually don't see them as limitations. But I also have to say we don't see a potential of removing those limitations anytime soon.
pairs.zh:
对我们来说，这是一段持续的旅程，也是一项持续的努力。关于剂量限制的问题，我们实际上并不视其为限制。但我也必须说，我们并不认为短期内有可能取消这些限制。

原文：And this is an ongoing journey and an ongoing effort for us. With respect to the sort of dosing restrictions, we actually don't see them as limitations. But I also have to say we don't see a potential of removing those limitations anytime soon.

pairs.en: Emmanuel Papadakis--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Emmanuel Papadakis -- 分析师

Emmanuel Papadakis--Analyst

pairs.en: Thank you for taking the question. Maybe a question on Sema ahead of potential inclusion in 2027 IRA price negotiation. Perhaps you could just enlighten us as to what magnitude the price cut you have seen in your midterm planning and your latest perspectives on potential impact in the commercial channel from reduced pricing in Medicare. And then on CagriSema ahead of the first redefined results.
pairs.zh:
感谢您的问题。首先关于Sema，它可能被纳入2027年IRA价格谈判。您能否说明一下，在中长期规划中您预计的降价幅度，以及对于Medicare降价对商业渠道潜在影响的最新看法？此外，关于CagriSema，在首次重新定义结果公布之前，您有何看法？

Thank you for taking the question. Maybe a question on Sema ahead of potential inclusion in 2027 IRA price negotiation. Perhaps you could just enlighten us as to what magnitude the price cut you have seen in your midterm planning and your latest perspectives on potential impact in the commercial channel from reduced pricing in Medicare. And then on CagriSema ahead of the first redefined results.

pairs.en: Just talk to us a little bit about your device capacity for the dual chamber pen device at launch. Would that be enough to switch a significant proportion of patients from Sema to CagriSema over that 2026, '27 time frame? Or indeed, is there any reason why you wouldn't expect the majority of patients to start switching over? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
请跟我们谈谈你们在推出双腔笔设备时的装置产能。在2026年至2027年的时间框架内，这能否足以将相当一部分患者从Sema转换到CagriSema？或者，是否有任何理由认为大多数患者不会开始转换？谢谢。

Just talk to us a little bit about your device capacity for the dual chamber pen device at launch. Would that be enough to switch a significant proportion of patients from Sema to CagriSema over that 2026, '27 time frame? Or indeed, is there any reason why you wouldn't expect the majority of patients to start switching over? Thank you.

Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.zh:
谢谢，Emmanuel。第一个关于IRA和最新的那个问题，是问你的，Doug。

Thank you, Emmanuel. The first one on the IRA and the latest there, that goes to you, Doug.

pairs.en: Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, North America Operations
pairs.zh:
Doug Langa——执行副总裁，北美运营  
Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, North America Operations

pairs.en: Yep. Thanks, Emmanuel, for the question. Maybe as a starting point, I'd like to say that we fundamentally disagree with the principles of price setting. It hurts innovation.
pairs.zh:
是的。感谢Emmanuel的提问。或许作为开场，我想说我们从根本上反对定价原则。这会损害创新。

Yep. Thanks, Emmanuel, for the question. Maybe as a starting point, I'd like to say that we fundamentally disagree with the principles of price setting. It hurts innovation.

pairs.en: It potentially creates higher out-of-pocket costs for seniors and less choice. So, that's not good. What I would say is that we're not going to comment on price, but we've worked through the first negotiations on NovoLog and Fiasp. And as you know, that's a minor part of our business.
pairs.zh:
这可能会导致老年人自付费用更高，选择更少。所以，这并不好。我想说的是，我们不会对价格发表评论，但我们已经完成了NovoLog和Fiasp的首轮谈判。如您所知，这只是我们业务的一小部分。

原文：
It potentially creates higher out-of-pocket costs for seniors and less choice. So, that's not good. What I would say is that we're not going to comment on price, but we've worked through the first negotiations on NovoLog and Fiasp. And as you know, that's a minor part of our business.

pairs.en: So, we expect limited impact there. And then I would say, as it relates to a readthrough to semaglutide, it's just way too early. This has been a new process for both us and the government. We're learning a lot.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们预计那里的影响有限。接下来我想说，至于对semaglutide的解读，现在还太早。这对我们和政府来说都是一个新过程，我们正在学习很多。

原文：So, we expect limited impact there. And then I would say, as it relates to a readthrough to semaglutide, it's just way too early. This has been a new process for both us and the government. We're learning a lot.

pairs.en: I'm sure they learned a lot, but I don't want to speculate on what that may mean for semaglutide readthrough.
pairs.zh:
我相信他们学到了很多，但我不想推测这对semaglutide的readthrough可能意味着什么。

I'm sure they learned a lot, but I don't want to speculate on what that may mean for semaglutide readthrough.

pairs.zh:

Thank you, Doug. And for the second question on CagriSema capacity, over to you, Karsten.

pairs.en: Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Karsten Munk Knudsen——执行副总裁、首席财务官

Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. Hi, Emmanuel. Thank you for the question. For CagriSema and supply chain strategy, then, of course, we learned a lot from Wegovy.
pairs.zh:
是的。嗨，Emmanuel。谢谢你的提问。关于CagriSema和供应链策略，当然，我们从Wegovy中学到了很多。

Yeah. Hi, Emmanuel. Thank you for the question. For CagriSema and supply chain strategy, then, of course, we learned a lot from Wegovy.

pairs.en: And we are full speed in terms of scaling our capacities linked to CagriSema. It is a dual-chamber device. So, scalability is different compared to multiuse devices that we have in other parts of our portfolio. But we are rapidly scaling the CagriSema device.
pairs.zh:
我们正在全力扩展与CagriSema相关的产能。这是一款双腔设备。因此，其可扩展性与我们产品组合中其他多用途设备不同。但我们正在快速提升CagriSema设备的产能。

And we are full speed in terms of scaling our capacities linked to CagriSema. It is a dual-chamber device. So, scalability is different compared to multiuse devices that we have in other parts of our portfolio. But we are rapidly scaling the CagriSema device.

pairs.en: We are exploring a co-formulation also to improve scalability. It's not without risk, and that's why I say we're exploring the opportunity to do so. And then bear in mind, behind CagriSema in our pipeline, we have a Amycretin in a subcutaneous version, which we will report out in the first quarter of next year, which is another offering together with the STEP UP. And then as my last comment, I would say, given the clinical profile of semaglutide there, we believe that we will be selling semaglutide for many, many years to come, and we are building the infrastructure to compete on that at a global scale for many years to come.
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.zh:
谢谢，Karsten，也感谢这些提问。那么，我们准备好回答下一组问题了，请。

Thank you, Karsten, and also thanks for the questions. With that, we are ready for the next set of questions, please.

pairs.en: Simon Baker--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Simon Baker--分析师

Simon Baker--Analyst

pairs.en: Thank you for taking my questions. Two, if I may. Firstly, going back to the obesity pipeline, you announced that you terminated the development of the once-monthly injectable GLP-1/GIP due to portfolio considerations. I wonder if you could elaborate on that and also update us on your appetite for a monthly injectable obesity treatment.
pairs.zh:
谢谢您的提问。我想提两个问题。首先，回到肥胖症药物管线——您宣布因产品组合考量终止了每月一次注射型GLP-1/GIP药物的开发。能否请您详细说明一下，并更新一下贵公司对每月一次注射型肥胖症治疗药物的兴趣？

Thank you for taking my questions. Two, if I may. Firstly, going back to the obesity pipeline, you announced that you terminated the development of the once-monthly injectable GLP-1/GIP due to portfolio considerations. I wonder if you could elaborate on that and also update us on your appetite for a monthly injectable obesity treatment.

pairs.en: And then a question on Icodec in the U.S. Given the complete response letter and leaving aside the questions on manufacturing, is a Type 1 carve-out from the application a possible solution to expediting this? Because I assume that one mustn't just think about Icodec, but also IcoSema, which is potentially the bigger opportunity and obviously held up by this. Any thoughts on that would be much appreciated. Thank you.
pairs.zh:
接下来一个关于Icodec在美国的问题。鉴于完整的回复函，暂且不谈生产方面的问题，从申请中剥离出Type 1是否为加快这一进程的可行解决方案？因为我认为不能只考虑Icodec，还有IcoSema，后者可能是更大的机会，显然也因此受阻。非常感谢您对此的任何看法。谢谢。

And then a question on Icodec in the U.S. Given the complete response letter and leaving aside the questions on manufacturing, is a Type 1 carve-out from the application a possible solution to expediting this? Because I assume that one mustn't just think about Icodec, but also IcoSema, which is potentially the bigger opportunity and obviously held up by this. Any thoughts on that would be much appreciated. Thank you.

pairs.en: Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations
pairs.zh:
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you, Simon. Both of those go to you, Martin. Firstly, on the once monthly GLP-1/GIP and secondly, on Icodec.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Simon。这两个问题都交给你，Martin。首先，关于每月一次的GLP-1/GIP，其次，关于Icodec。

Thank you, Simon. Both of those go to you, Martin. Firstly, on the once monthly GLP-1/GIP and secondly, on Icodec.

pairs.en: Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development
pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Yes. Absolutely. So, I just want to reiterate, I think we all along stated that the once monthly GLP-1/GIP study that we conducted was an exploratory study, more assessing the concept of one smarter technology than the actual GLP-1/GIP component. It was exploratory.
pairs.zh:
是的，完全正确。所以，我想重申一下，我认为我们一直表明，我们进行的每月一次的GLP-1/GIP研究是一项探索性研究，更多地是评估一种更智能技术的概念，而非实际的GLP-1/GIP成分。这是一项探索性研究。

Yes. Absolutely. So, I just want to reiterate, I think we all along stated that the once monthly GLP-1/GIP study that we conducted was an exploratory study, more assessing the concept of one smarter technology than the actual GLP-1/GIP component. It was exploratory.

pairs.en: And while we definitely can use the data, the current profile was not something that we would take into further clinical development. So, basically, we still have this focus. We do see once monthly as convenience more than anything else. Our primary focus is efficacy and safety.
pairs.zh:
尽管我们确实可以使用这些数据，但当前的概况并不是我们会将其推进到进一步临床开发的内容。所以，基本上，我们仍然有这个关注点。我们确实认为每月一次主要是便利性而非其他。我们的主要关注点是有效性和安全性。

And while we definitely can use the data, the current profile was not something that we would take into further clinical development. So, basically, we still have this focus. We do see once monthly as convenience more than anything else. Our primary focus is efficacy and safety.

pairs.en: And as we already discussed that we have a very competitive pipeline and portfolio. But we will maintain this focus with either next generation of this technology or alternative technologies. Specifically on Icodec, we are in ongoing dialogue with the FDA. So, I don't want to speculate too much.
pairs.zh:
正如我们已经讨论过的，我们拥有极具竞争力的研发管线与产品组合。但我们将继续聚焦于这一领域，无论是发展下一代技术还是替代技术。具体到Icodec，我们正在与FDA持续沟通中。因此，我不想过早做出推测。

And as we already discussed that we have a very competitive pipeline and portfolio. But we will maintain this focus with either next generation of this technology or alternative technologies. Specifically on Icodec, we are in ongoing dialogue with the FDA. So, I don't want to speculate too much.

pairs.en: But obviously, part of this is a potential carve-out of the Type 1 diabetes. You should not see this impact the IcoSema dialogue.
pairs.zh:
但显然，其中一部分可能是对Type 1糖尿病的潜在剥离。你不应看到这影响IcoSema对话。

But obviously, part of this is a potential carve-out of the Type 1 diabetes. You should not see this impact the IcoSema dialogue.

pairs.en: Yeah. Thank you very much for taking my question. Wegovy heart failure, could you help us understand the additional data you are looking to file and whether you're going for a CV death and heart failure endpoints, sort of hard endpoints, in terms of the claim from the studies? I guess, the pooled analysis of the STEP-HFpEF program showed a strong 6% to 9% risk reduction in CV death and heart failure events. But the significant numbers of patients in select and flow, which, I guess, could be relevant.
pairs.zh:
是的，非常感谢您回答我的问题。关于Wegovy在心力衰竭方面的应用，能否帮助我们了解您计划提交的额外数据，以及您是否打算在研究中针对心血管死亡和心力衰竭终点（即所谓的硬终点）提出相关主张？我推测，STEP-HFpEF项目的汇总分析显示，心血管死亡和心力衰竭事件的风险降低了6%至9%，幅度显著。但SELECT和FLOW试验中的大量患者数据可能也具有相关性。

原文：
Yeah. Thank you very much for taking my question. Wegovy heart failure, could you help us understand the additional data you are looking to file and whether you're going for a CV death and heart failure endpoints, sort of hard endpoints, in terms of the claim from the studies? I guess, the pooled analysis of the STEP-HFpEF program showed a strong 6% to 9% risk reduction in CV death and heart failure events. But the significant numbers of patients in select and flow, which, I guess, could be relevant.

pairs.en: So, an understanding of what you're aiming to achieve that would be great. Thank you. And then the second one, just as a follow-up to INV-202. Could you help us understand, Martin, how INV-347 differs compared to INV-202 in terms of PK and CNS distribution and selective to the CV1 versus CV2 receptors? Just trying to understand whether this could actually leapfrog Monlunabant into Phase 3.
pairs.zh:
那么，理解您想要实现的目标会非常好。谢谢。第二个问题，作为对INV-202的跟进。Martin，您能否帮助我们理解，INV-347在PK和CNS分布方面与INV-202有何不同，以及它相对于CV1与CV2受体的选择性？我们只是试图了解这是否真的能让Monlunabant跨越到三期。

So, an understanding of what you're aiming to achieve that would be great. Thank you. And then the second one, just as a follow-up to INV-202. Could you help us understand, Martin, how INV-347 differs compared to INV-202 in terms of PK and CNS distribution and selective to the CV1 versus CV2 receptors? Just trying to understand whether this could actually leapfrog Monlunabant into Phase 3.

pairs.en: Thank you, Mark. And both of those two to you, Martin. Firstly, semaglutide in HFpEF and secondly, within [Inaudible] and INV347.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Mark。也祝你两者都好，Martin。首先，semaglutide在HFpEF中的应用，其次，在[听不清]和INV347中。

Thank you, Mark. And both of those two to you, Martin. Firstly, semaglutide in HFpEF and secondly, within [Inaudible] and INV347.

pairs.en: Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development
pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Yes. Thank you very much, Mark, for those questions. First of all on HFpEF. As you'll recall, we conducted two dedicated HFpEF trials in patients with established HFpEF 1 in diabetes and one in patients without diabetes but with obesity.
pairs.zh:
是的。非常感谢你，Mark，提出的这些问题。首先关于HFpEF。你记得，我们进行了两项专门的HFpEF试验，针对已确诊的HFpEF患者：一项针对糖尿病患者，另一项针对无糖尿病但肥胖的患者。

Yes. Thank you very much, Mark, for those questions. First of all on HFpEF. As you'll recall, we conducted two dedicated HFpEF trials in patients with established HFpEF 1 in diabetes and one in patients without diabetes but with obesity.

pairs.en: When we do the meta-analysis of the two trials, we see a 69% decrease in risk of CV death hospitalization for heart failure. So, absolutely very strong data and something that has encouraged us a lot. This was also why the FDA granted us breakthrough designation. As we discussed last quarter, we had fairly few events in these two reasonably small studies and, through our dialogue with the FDA, was very clear that if we could sort of increase the volume of events to further substantiate this, the likelihood of getting hard endpoints into the U.S.
pairs.zh:
对这两项试验进行荟萃分析时，我们发现心血管死亡或心衰住院风险降低了69%。因此，这绝对是非常有力的数据，也令我们备受鼓舞。这也是FDA授予我们突破性疗法认定的原因。正如我们上个季度讨论的那样，这两项规模相对较小的研究中事件数量相当少，而通过我们与FDA的沟通，我们非常清楚地认识到：如果能通过增加事件数量来进一步证实这一点，那么在美国获得硬终点指标的可能性就会很大。

When we do the meta-analysis of the two trials, we see a 69% decrease in risk of CV death hospitalization for heart failure. So, absolutely very strong data and something that has encouraged us a lot. This was also why the FDA granted us breakthrough designation. As we discussed last quarter, we had fairly few events in these two reasonably small studies and, through our dialogue with the FDA, was very clear that if we could sort of increase the volume of events to further substantiate this, the likelihood of getting hard endpoints into the U.S.

pairs.en: label would increase given that we have some strong -- have had and will have some strong readouts in the not-so-distant future. It was a reasonably easy decision to say we can accept a small delay and then increase our likelihood of getting hard endpoints into the label as compared to the more functional test. So, we saw that as a really good pattern. On Monlunabant second generation, it's still early days.
pairs.zh:
考虑到我们在不久的将来已经并将会获得一些强有力的数据读出，标签（label）将会增加。这是一个相对容易的决定：我们可以接受短暂的延迟，从而相比更功能性的测试，提高将硬终点纳入标签的可能性。因此，我们视之为一个非常好的模式。关于Monlunabant第二代产品，目前仍处于早期阶段。

label would increase given that we have some strong -- have had and will have some strong readouts in the not-so-distant future. It was a reasonably easy decision to say we can accept a small delay and then increase our likelihood of getting hard endpoints into the label as compared to the more functional test. So, we saw that as a really good pattern. On Monlunabant second generation, it's still early days.

pairs.en: There is a potential for a longer half life. So, a potential for less frequent than once-daily dosing, which is obviously attractive. And further, a potential for even less brain penetration. Again, we are quite confident with the safety profile of Monlunabant, but again, if second-generation could have an even lower likelihood of potential adverse events, that would be attractive.
pairs.zh:
半衰期可能更长，因此有可能实现比每日一次更低的给药频率，这显然很有吸引力。此外，还可能实现更低的脑渗透。再次强调，我们对Monlunabant的安全性非常有信心，但如果第二代产品能够进一步降低潜在不良事件的可能性，那也将很有吸引力。

There is a potential for a longer half life. So, a potential for less frequent than once-daily dosing, which is obviously attractive. And further, a potential for even less brain penetration. Again, we are quite confident with the safety profile of Monlunabant, but again, if second-generation could have an even lower likelihood of potential adverse events, that would be attractive.

pairs.en: I don't think you will see anything surpass our progress of Monlunabant. We see this as a really, really strong life cycle management opportunity.
pairs.zh:
我认为你不会看到任何东西能超越我们在Monlunabant上的进展。我们将其视为一个非常非常强大的生命周期管理机会。

I don't think you will see anything surpass our progress of Monlunabant. We see this as a really, really strong life cycle management opportunity.

pairs.zh:
Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen——总裁兼首席执行官

Lars Fruergaard Jrgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Jacob. I hope it comes across that we are very pleased with the momentum in our business, in particular, our GLP-1 business in diabetes and obesity, not least the strong growth for Wegovy script trends in the U.S., which is really fueling the upgrade we have communicated today, which also means that our supply is on track in being able to serve many more patients, both short and longer term. We're also excited about our pipeline, the news we have announced recently, but also what we have coming up later in the year. So, with that, thank you also from my side for your questions and attention today.
pairs.zh:
谢谢Jacob。我希望大家能感受到我们对业务发展势头非常满意，特别是我们在糖尿病和肥胖症领域的GLP-1业务，尤其是Wegovy处方趋势在美国的强劲增长，这确实推动了今天我们传达的业绩上调，同时也意味着我们的供应进展顺利，能够在短期和长期内为更多患者提供服务。我们对产品管线、近期宣布的消息以及今年晚些时候即将推出的内容也感到兴奋。因此，我也借此机会感谢大家今天的提问和关注。

Thank you, Jacob. I hope it comes across that we are very pleased with the momentum in our business, in particular, our GLP-1 business in diabetes and obesity, not least the strong growth for Wegovy script trends in the U.S., which is really fueling the upgrade we have communicated today, which also means that our supply is on track in being able to serve many more patients, both short and longer term. We're also excited about our pipeline, the news we have announced recently, but also what we have coming up later in the year. So, with that, thank you also from my side for your questions and attention today.

pairs.en: With that, we close the call. Thank you.
pairs.zh:
至此，我们结束通话。谢谢。

With that, we close the call. Thank you.
